## Supreme Court Halts Deportations
The Supreme Court ruled early Saturday morning that, at least temporarily, alleged Venezuelan gang members held at the Bluebonnet Detention Center in Anson [could not be deported](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAURE9jd1iAcZwUFNu4y7ZbWsD_xCgYLPiOkz39KrnC1iPNzHs_1_lqQgzp9m1W1PT0eU541IhEWGbTw1ZCIoRKptjd3atZM-UySy4HxhWTfAYT4mtWLWjL4SJa1GJUg1Cn8zC0ixbW9l6CRwGjNQA9SnlRJymgP4M3fRv0u4wryYXgfJDdMHpwYK0HGPkw-kZxhEC5dLQg4dNUH1_5gaVzeW2jXoi22vRfjZwaOR3H0fn8fFO880ZOW46BgquNnOq-FVyRubwXYjZmd68s4cEAt1zIUMipsgcm_N0xmlTZZ4_tCbAwcaaFOUy0lxczMWBimHANWJlx1BYN2xFiDPU0NorfVhPi5yL9T-xDy78AAAD__5olkys). The ruling follows a previous order that allowed the Trump administration to deport migrants under the Alien Enemies Act, an 18th-century wartime law, so long as [they were given due process](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ8GOiNjbAiFi7-hy99eiYx3SawzNlovIbmnP-XKa68cjTSa7_u4zlcXYki3_25Dy881zwnPEpEZaXYd7BQSIxR2tBz-s7gtc6ZZSWWE1ELJGVyIr1nXYBcJY1ujbQdtWt1fjKnvFjol-xV9d-lH1SnXO6_bVfvxMhjoUdbBvsekVrJtpTSqMcMKHpZlBRikGdZKS4TAmRq-I-PTlTW-8gOp8Xmro70z76Xq_lVqqtR0nmeTFv-mePeVmvYcAwdfKjWVYyfcUPh8EP_OIhMgFcF0bLtwsIUUCpPjkJNImQXgnonFAxN-HRhdKiLlU5BPTsl21GNNFvYzxBhKP1Ra3jYX4s9L_pvbh1XfAQAA___53JLE). Saturday’s order came after the American Civil Liberties Union [filed an emergency lawsuit](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1ugzAUBeCnMVvQxT8QBg9d2NK1I7J9rxO3BkfmNiR9-oq-QrcjHemTzvm4zBeXclqv724hy89Y5pX2LRMz1dkpvNe0MuHGrvrv8LW5pXCpswRpTqBPEmZ0Kb9m3aD1gGPXkO0GbTrdn41pblaFvkdlRhVdNKPrwYxkwNHZm0gKYpPsgYGW0HUARrZmiBjQ-4g4gBmi0ECYuNSWb8T0dFvMr_Kg2oayNNnemO-bUG9CTkJO-7633oejE3I6xgg5ucopZDpi-EFV8XM9d7k01eJ9TzmnrR-EhuviUv5T-X9fPKz8DQAA___0sXPp), stating that the Trump administration wasn’t complying with the initial order. The Supreme Court urged the federal government to file a response “as soon as possible.” Justices Alito and Thomas dissented from the majority. [You can read the court order here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFy6yAQRb9G6qyBFSukguI16vzalAzSLjYTZDSALTtfn4mL_EDKe4tzZs7H2Z5diOF2-e82NvXpk73xUSLXytm6nvYcbpWpVJeX-_pZ3JZqyhYE4EmoEwhLLsSXVS2ZRdAkWzZSK5RqGBHbq8F-VFoLHMBPy0Lj1CMQoJ9WhAEH2QbzAxMKhJRCIHSoPa20LJ5IC9S-UYIp1JS7euXKT1d8fKUH525NWxvNtda9NP2_BuYG5uM4unLfM2-8pnuu3SU9GphTJs6lgfl9_i6h5AT4le0qR-528m02tB8hxlAG3Shx2VyIb1H9W56Hge8AAAD__wViedE).
## 3D-Printed Starbucks Set to Open
The world’s first 3D-printed Starbucks [is set to open in less than two weeks](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFugzAQxvGnMRvIPmwMg4cubOnaERl8BKvGRvYlJG9fJar6At1Pf93v-7pMF-uDj9dPu6Ohx5qmiGcJSIR5sq07so-ErpDN8235LnZPlPIEHFTNZQ18ctaH5yQrZ2buBlGhEVoqIbteqWoznYC-tVwOHapBCwkLtn0nhdW2461eK29eMS6BC8G5gkbp1S1unlfnNFd6ZZKj85RyQxsSPmxZwzPdMTdL2qtgNqKjsPaDwchgPM-z2Z_FRhspRZ9eRwzGl4rBWNKNtvodYTDaTH4JyGBsXf0rrf-o9ZzTGcvdh4A1cND9AG1zbEeVjTtOH4IvnWaSX3frw_sZ-t-EdwM_AQAA__81QIbl) in Brownsville. The 1,400-square-foot building began construction in December. It will not feature any seating, offering only walk-up and drive-thru service. [COBOD International](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyqzAQheGngc6MtEiWKVTchs63Tcms2MXWRCBG2hj77TNOHiHdqb6Z839cpyvGFLfbf1zZy3PJ08ZHTSzCZcKe9hI3YaqCJXzNnxXXLLlMoMCelDmBmghjek2mJR8UDbplr52x2pwv1rZ3r5YZ8cLQY-AAfcDQ68GdtYZhcI6xjf6NKQNKa6UsdNYtNFMIC5FT1i2NUUxRcunkzsJPrEt65QeXbs5rm_xdZK9N_6-BsYHxOI7ukZ-cVnx_qB3FwrPk8mpgnPO64_a7QqYGxrZ42o-YUqxn1xh1WzGmH1j-luPh4TsAAP__Bu52Ig), a Denmark-based firm that seeks to automate at least 50% of construction projects, provided the 3D-printing technology. The building’s shell is [made of concrete](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1u7CAQBeCnwZ1XAwazW1Dcxt3eNqU1wHiNgu0VzP747SNHUV4g3UgjnaPvfFzHK6ac1tt_XMjxe9rGlV41EzOVEbt4L2llipWx-Ef4rLhsvJVRgTIt6FbBGDHlfdRNdB7iRTbkpNVG6v5sTDM76VUXz7azOiD2NnQE2OlA_WRBy0vfJHeEgVYgJYBRJ2OnGKL3U4wWjJ2EBoqJt3LimZjeWKe8b08qp7AtTXYz872K7p9Qg1BD2D2Vw3B8hRqOU6jhF9D-mNJ6ax_F49piCXNiCvwoJNTQFBfvr5Rzqr0VGm4LpvxdxX8b6OnUVwAAAP__CIh8Sg), which was poured in layers by robotic arms and printed in just six days.
## Motorcycle Pile-Up Injures 17
At least 17 people were injured in a [chain-reaction crash](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL3O4yAURJ8Gd7Yuf8EpKLZxl223tDAXYrQ4RHA3JG-_cl7h66YYzeicP7f15lJOj_tvdwRL71jWR-gtB6JQVyfxWdODAjZydfvn_zZ3FCp1FSD0CGoUsKJL-bOqAe0GeOVDsNwozdVl1nrYrYIolYQZr8j1fAUjQDoZ_DY7z7WBIdlzDJQAzgG0mLSJ6HHbIqIBbSJTEDBRqRPtgcLbtZg_5RXq5MsxZLsTPRuTv5hYmFh671Msb3VinAUmljMyscRSaeyl0j4mqfv4JfEfn8Poq2v7UC0-e8o5tYthCu6HS_n7QT8z87LifwAAAP__E-15DQ) involving 15 motorcycles in the southbound lanes of I-35W in Fort Worth Friday night. The crash reportedly took place when the lead motorcycle’s [front tire blew out](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGvozAQhH8NdBvZBmMoKK6he9deiRbvOljPwZG9CS___pT8hVeOZjTSzPfva_3CmOJx_Ys3nuUn5PXgsyYW4bJiR_cSD2GqgmV7-O-Ktyy5rEYZC6oHo1bCmF5r39K8KZp0y7N2vdX9MFrb7vPEqhs4jM5og3raAtFIHCarBgp6G9o4v8tUb5TWSllzsS6Qp-2ddMq60PSKKUouF9lZ-AdrSK_85HLx-dameRe516b705ilMct5npczIL7NxixYJPrEjVmkYAjRN2ap-SH7lh8HQcKDK-QAETp7gk-5MgEK7Fyi4JVBCnqGO5bvE18Qckr5jMcVfMG6QzyeOT3f-vOLf_nEtTGLGR3obVI0MoPpLEFvnIbJsoUpGOwDcec215aZ7mdMKdbBNb263jCmzy75HY3nbP4HAAD__55PoKU), causing 14 other motorcycles to crash and resulting in multiple fires. Officials called the crash a “mass casualty event,” [with four people in critical condition](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHSpCAQhJ8Gs7EAQd2A4BKz_9ILLZDhlzuULZhd17e_0lf4s6np6q7--s_X_GVjivv3b7uhoU_I845HTUiEZbadf5a4E_pKtrjX8q_aLVMus-RSA1cg-extTOesGm8c9w_RoBGD0kL1o9bNavhDh94JMY6jsoPwYuz0Q3vnvMR-CNhEc4VxJbkQnGvZ6iH4xTsXvB-4HgJTHH2kXFpakfBja0hnfmNpl7w1yaxEz8q6X0xOTE7HcbSLqxfFpTM53RYmp-vF5HQDLOeSEJZi6wp5hwidPiDusOdCK4RcCI77jPvfV8EKliChrQSiB_uiNZdIEStUezI5NcX45xFTirUfmOLfm43prkc_G_Vt5P8AAAD___DljpE), six in serious condition, and seven sustaining minor injuries.

clean_body: The world's first 3D-printed Starbucks in Brownsville. | | | | | | Sunday, April 20, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1836, General Sam Houston , allowing them to choose the ground for the upcoming Battle of San Jacinto, which would eventually secure Texas independence. Today, Christians across the world celebrate Jesus’ resurrection, the cornerstone of Christian faith. Christians believe Christ's triumph over death offers hope, renewal, and eternal life. Many Christians in America will celebrate by going to church, followed by Easter Brunch. If you celebrate Easter, what makes the day special for you and your family? Hit reply and tell us your story—we would love to hear it. Soon, you'll be able to visit a in Brownsville. Read all about it in today's Roundup. The ruling follows a previous order that allowed the Trump administration to deport migrants under the Alien Enemies Act, an 18th-century wartime law, so long as . Saturday’s order came after the American Civil Liberties Union , stating that the Trump administration wasn’t complying with the initial order. The Supreme Court urged the federal government to file a response “as soon as possible.” Justices Alito and Thomas dissented from the majority. . 3D-Printed Starbucks Set to Open The world’s first 3D-printed Starbucks in Brownsville. The 1,400-square-foot building began construction in December. It will not feature any seating, offering only walk-up and drive-thru service. , a Denmark-based firm that seeks to automate at least 50% of construction projects, provided the 3D-printing technology. The building’s shell is , which was poured in layers by robotic arms and printed in just six days. Motorcycle Pile-Up Injures 17 At least 17 people were injured in a involving 15 motorcycles in the southbound lanes of I-35W in Fort Worth Friday night. The crash reportedly took place when the lead motorcycle’s , causing 14 other motorcycles to crash and resulting in multiple fires. Officials called the crash a “mass casualty event,” , six in serious condition, and seven sustaining minor injuries. | The "19 Financial Secrets That Most Seniors Never Hear About" offers a curated list of discounts to help you save on everyday expenses. April 20th, 2025

It’s important you download your concealed carry certificate before it's banned for good.

Due to increased pressure from lawmakers, a website offering you a certificate for America’s Top CCW Gun Permit **could be shut down at any moment.**

Which is why it’s important you download your **Concealed Carry Certificate ASAP**.

Wait even one more day and we won’t be able to guarantee this certificate will be available to download.

This certificate is great for gun owners because it takes advantage of a little-known (but 100% legal) loophole - **[allowing you to get a CCW certification from this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21191/6374453/ed8cd26815eddf0f3b42c7d78d5d3fc0bee95627/d8e14c44e08375d9cb11156901f62fcbd7b111cf). You don’t even have to leave your house to do it!**

This loophole ensures you encounter:
* Zero government red tape (and no exposing your private info to the Feds)...
* Zero lines, classroom time or books to read...
* Zero gun range time (you don’t even need to fire a gun to get this permit).

**[It’s as simple as visiting this site and answering a few questions (they’re simple)](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21191/6374453/ed8cd26815eddf0f3b42c7d78d5d3fc0bee95627/d8e14c44e08375d9cb11156901f62fcbd7b111cf).**

Plus you can complete the entire certification process online.

Download it directly to your phone or computer in as little as 30 minutes.

**You don’t even need to own a gun to get this permit...** that’s why it’s named America’s #1 Concealed Carry Permit.

31 states have agreed to accept this permit so far. That’s because it’s simply the closest and easiest path to a semi-nationally recognized permit that’s available right now.

This permit isn’t just a basic concealed carry permit either. **It’s one of a kind... and is available to you No Matter what state you reside in.**

**Hurry and get it now.**

**[There are no guarantees this website](https://links.firearmupgrades.com/a/1537/click/21191/6374453/ed8cd26815eddf0f3b42c7d78d5d3fc0bee95627/d8e14c44e08375d9cb11156901f62fcbd7b111cf)** will be able to legally deliver this certificate to your email address after today!

Friend,
Today, we celebrate the Glorious Resurrection of God’s Only Begotten Son, our Lord and Savior, Jesus Christ, and we proclaim, as Christians have done for nearly 2,000 years, “**HE IS RISEN!** ”
Through the pain and sacrifice of Jesus on the Cross, we saw God’s boundless Love and Devotion to all Humanity and, in that moment of His Resurrection, History was forever changed with the Promise of Everlasting Life.
I want to wish Christians everywhere a Happy and very Blessed Holiday.
America is a Nation of Believers. We need God, we want God and, with His help, we will make our Nation Stronger, Safer, Greater, more Prosperous, and more United than ever before.
Thank you, and HAPPY EASTER!
Donald J. Trump

If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) [ **🚨Now that Donald Trump is THREE MONTHS into his reign of terror, we’re conducting an emergency poll in your state 🚨 **](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=3&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) [**Donald Trump Impeachment Polling
Your Response due by 11:59PM**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=4&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) [**_Should Donald Trump be impeached? _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=5&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=6&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) | | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=7&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)

| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=8&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=9&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
---

Without your response to represent local Democrats, our data will be completely skewed and we’ll have to ask a less informed Democrat. [**_Please submit your poll by clicking here or the buttons above ASAP >>_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=10&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
We don’t know what else to say to get you to understand the gravity of Trump’s presidency...

Just look at everything he’s done:
* Pardoned every single January 6th Insurrectionist
* Attacked Social Security and Medicare
* Instituted unprecedented tariffs on China and other countries
* Attacked the LGBTQ+ community over and over again
* Gave Elon Musk permission to fire thousands of hard-working federal employees
* And so much more!!!

**Trump is making a mockery of our government and our Democracy.**

That’s why we’re doing everything in our power to hold him accountable and end his unchecked and dangerous power.

But, we NEED support from Democrats in your state to see this through. [**_Please, respond before 11:59 PM: _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=11&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
[**_Should Donald Trump be impeached? _**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=12&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=13&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI) | | [YES ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=14&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
---
| [NO ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=15&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
---
[UNSURE ➞](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60646?t=16&akid=23009%2E4449941%2EAedqdI)
---
Thank you,

_Fight for Reform_

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Shapiro's covert strategy
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=cf34da6066&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[After two years in office, Shapiro fails to fill key vacancies on state commission](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ad6540a711&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
When Josh Shapiro was sworn in as governor in 2023, there were four commissioner vacancies on the eleven-person Pennsylvania Human Relations Commission (PHRC). Over two years later, the four vacancies remain unfilled. Shapiro, who likes to[ boast](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b8e822e6dd&e=b7b3eddce2) about “getting s*** done,” has not appointed a single person to fill those vacancies. While it’s certainly possible the governor’s failure to make any appointments is just laziness or a matter of priorities, there’s a good argument to be made that the seats are empty as part of a political strategy. **Why It Matters.** Our analysis reveals six of the commissioners are registered Democrats and one is a registered Republican. Under the leadership of these same commissioners in 2023, the PHRC enacted new[ regulations](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8c2f79f6c8&e=b7b3eddce2) changing the definition of sex to include gender identity and gender expression. Is it conceivable Shapiro wanted to keep the commission unbalanced with only one Republican commissioner? Perhaps, a heavily Democratic commission would be more likely to push through the 2023 regulation changes?

[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fbada1f1cf&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
---
|
### **2.[Are Pennsylvania’s Democratic Supreme Court Justices acting like politicians?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a4e28695d7&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Stephen Eustis, Jr._
The Pennsylvania Supreme Court wields significant authority over the state’s legal framework, shaping policies on election laws, emergency powers, and more. Since 2015, its 5-2 Democratic majority, including Justices Christine Donohue, Kevin Dougherty, and David Wecht, has driven decisions that, while often legally defensible, frequently align with one political perspective.

An examination of three pivotal 2020 rulings — on Covid-19 emergency powers, mail-in ballot deadlines, and the exclusion of the Green Party from the presidential ballot — reveals a concerning pattern. These decisions raise questions about whether Democratic justices are acting more like politicians than impartial arbiters, a trend that risks undermining public trust in the judiciary.

**Why It Matters**. When a court’s rulings consistently produce outcomes that benefit one political perspective, it risks being seen as an extension of that agenda rather than a fair interpreter of the law.

Public trust in the judiciary hinges on its ability to remain above partisan fray, serving as a check on governmental power without appearing to favor one side. The current 5-2 Democratic majority, with its history of rulings that align with one party’s interests, risks undermining that trust, creating a perception of bias that could have lasting consequences for the court’s legitimacy.

A judiciary that reflects a broader range of perspectives is better equipped to interpret the Constitution and laws in a way that serves all Pennsylvanians, not just one segment of the political spectrum. Achieving this balance doesn’t necessarily mean rejecting qualified justices, but it does require acknowledging when a court’s trajectory seems to mirror political priorities rather than impartial justice.
**[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=810091d708&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Simon Webber: The case for abolishing zoning](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=8689520e1a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stu Bykofsky: Predictably, the soda tax failed to deliver](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=a426e28194&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Conservative group files suit over Biden-era documents related to Franklin County project](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=e016ed7523&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: 19th-century Philadelphia’s macabre, union-organizing novelist](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9704427c30&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: Could we just be normal?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=defa88d503&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Beth Ann Rosica: The inevitable federal-state showdown on education](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4dbbec1b25&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Jonathan Russell: Hubris is not a leadership virtue](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=62151d778a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Michael Thomas Leibrandt: Philadelphia’s college basketball team that might have won it all](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=63b843d517&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=35e6ddc8b7&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
|
# **4\. New Podcast**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ab0ec60250&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **Your guide to A.I.'s surprising impacts in PA | Voices of Reason – PA Sen. Tracy Pennycuick**[[Watch](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f1dfbd1aa&e=b7b3eddce2)]
---
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
A [new report this week from _BlueStateRed_](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=3d4e221af5&e=b7b3eddce2) breaks down the 2024 election in Pennsylvania and makes for fascinating reading for anyone interested in the massive shifts in voter sentiment and the emerging party realignment. BlueStateRed principal (and _Broad + Liberty_ co-founder) Albert Eisenberg breaks it all down, showing how racial, religious, and ethnic minority voters shifted rightward like never before, delivering the presidency and Congress to Republicans in 2024.
---
|
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_

name: Senator Steve Daines
subject: He has risen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
On this Easter Sunday, I join you in celebrating the glorious resurrection of Jesus Christ, the cornerstone of our faith and the promise of eternal hope. |
---

Fellow American,

On this Easter Sunday, I join you in celebrating the glorious resurrection of Jesus Christ, the cornerstone of our faith and the promise of eternal hope. As we gather in our churches, homes, and communities, we’re reminded of the profound love and sacrifice of this day.

The resurrection of Christ is a powerful testament to victory over darkness, inspiring us to live with courage and compassion. Here in Montana, I see this spirit every day—in the support of our neighbors, the shared faith and unity of our towns, and our deep commitment to family values.

I’m deeply grateful for the shared beliefs that bind us and the opportunity to serve you. This Easter, let’s recommit to strengthening our communities, uplifting one another, and keeping Montana a place where faith and family thrive. May the joy of Christ’s resurrection fill your hearts and homes.

_**From my family to yours, wishing you a blessed and joyful Easter.**_

Sincerely,

Steve Daines

Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track.

TO: Senator Cory Booker
FROM: Peter Willis
Subject: Thank you for standing up for Americans!
Dear Senator Cory Booker,
I want to express my deepest gratitude to you for the incredible sacrifice you made during your historic 25-hour speech in protest of the Trump administration.
Your unwavering commitment to justice and democracy is truly inspiring.
You’ve been a beacon of hope in a time when, in less than 100 days, the president has caused unimaginable harm to Americans’ safety, financial stability, and the very foundations of our democracy.
But your courage and relentless fight for what is right have shown us a way forward — a path that is not consumed by the chaos and destruction of the MAGA agenda.
As the GOP continues to attack you, I will not sit quietly. I’m signing this letter to thank you for your leadership and proudly chipping in $7 to Democracy On The Line to support the brave Democrats in Congress who are standing strong against the MAGA administration! » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]
ADD YOUR NAME TO THE “THANK YOU CORY BOOKER” LETTER » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_ltr_booker?amount=7]
Together, we will fight to protect our democracy!
X Peter Willis

## A Happy and Blessed Easter to All Our Readers! – HotAir
May all of our readers have a happy and blessed Easter celebration today! We would also like to wish our Jewish readers a belated blessed Passover, which took place a week ago. The setting of the work is a 19th century Sicilian village; the action takes place on the morning of Easter Sunday. Santuzza has been seduced and abandoned by Turridu. TWO thousand years ago a working-class Jew in Israel was executed by the Roman authorities at the instigation of Jewish religious leaders. He was buried, yet rose again, and history pivoted. The lives of billions were renewed; as a result old nations fell and new arose, cultures and science developed, all was changed utterly. Archaeologists in St Augustine, Florida, have unearthed remnants of the city’s brief British colonial period during a recent excavation. The dig in the historic Lincolnville neighbourhood revealed a dried-up moat from a British redoubt, a small military outpost constructed during the 20-year period when Britain controlled Florida. Dear Must Read Texas reader:
You receive the _free version_ of the indispensable Must Read Texas morning email (325k+ subscribers!), which we spend _several hours_ each weekday morning compiling.
As you know, instead of the PAID version with complete story summaries to save you time, you now receive _just the headlines_ and _links._
Our paid subscribers LOVE Must Read Texas, and we are confident you will too.

name: DLCC Newsletter
subject: Democrats stand up for democracy while Republicans attempt to undermine it … and everything else you need to know in the states.
disclaimer_text: paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005
body:
Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, April 20th, 2025. | | |
---
| | | [ ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW9WL4ySifRyEQyG7D6ZDcaKmFQcO_SqeUFRkYFn0WrvHHisWiwN-mSj2nwLaaiVAndhLwjC3x9MI2KUAa0DnJViqSOAPtdfRJrzMKtRCwblAPzKFs_R6EmdC41kVPYK1NtZwnf-3xNei6DVV3bQjC0Dt6Z7bPbLa-WU3gD_NUqMjXIaVTJ3Ba4pdi1CPGaoeX504_qO2n4usvG-m89tMVF8PxfxAbvUptFTMP47BX4grskRJ7yqTIoko-JLbUXD2UPZyYXAsDis-CysF4Mxu2jYSQi3oLIFcV4IDLBUde5ja2XfE6-0onvc1ga1ces2UFANBhQnt5EJZurSsFkKxWkOCkEusdwvgWAzSgoRknB_1N-fsTEc3JxqGg8DC8EaDVzc43_HDRJNlQH2tjwoG-G50ZWArAWGACOuYwWA8ETPomQyU-Wq1nl3VmV8OBQpGGAiIGB50MFBq7kaZNj1569M5yThBWsxxZ3Ep0qoINh6b-EhiqVMR02JuN4ctH5i6mQ/4ft/O1xWs_vdRAiwOJ8d2YLKEQ/h0/h001.XDb6sIw01GWsCFXzgauvD2FVWiTNEyva-bkuFv3aBQ0)
---
1️⃣ **_Nevada:_ State Dems advance bill to criminalize election subversion efforts **
Following Nevada Republicans’ fake electors scheme that attempted to subvert the 2020 election results, state Democrats advanced a bill to criminalize these efforts in order to safeguard our free and fair elections. [Every single Republican in the state Senate voted against it, but Democrats pushed the bill through to the state Assembly in a huge victory for our democratic process → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMZN2wuLYQk80fDg4WasI5Z1m9OkkkJ1jdeUzd95wPgHb6p1bR_1ci6BKJ4myZsJ2nrMY5qkv04GTcuQGOSTUDSY9XhZ-M3gzT_VqQWSaXrHjPELPgPbDscjnw2JRCuHUmz1r3llKcEInE3_cwTOe0NZNiqTmvhmJTDIF-agN-W5pYepoXqZBS3KKsTu5Yp5ZH2pj-PcpA6wmNx-WkVgpyiYnYWKlDtfb1cAjIpNd5X03ZkEUkRfMNktn0mrnV-asH_AoQEqjpMmWPZDJQEDsCvP7k6IRwL3bYoUTV_7hcVBmF9KuoEU4oEaTcaw8XHIALCwAcrQ6O2FtOCpsJmMtSHg_4tJK60yi77O8ko-8Qz22K4M5y7zMlyjeXPxJvCZT5DN7ooLCTZqMSR86ZbsAnETTVHLk5rDlIatFogx1QAtyG1sbZvX9EhGIwzovTLA_aS3LEv3OMumAFN7-2xFOCzWqQwNLdUk_hE9JEM7Jj4jf2kSIO-13voGJ-ahUDY0eIx_TJCIjUuxfz2o-qu07FT-slTdOpglOfd92RyROsepMgw7pB0ZrVTZ3yTmn6ukP3qakdcXSlLY_FQAtd3ORbs8/4ft/O1xWs_vdRAiwOJ8d2YLKEQ/h1/h001.7RpqTrFQNV1LnJy3_MtQAUHdoQic59YVUq0A8pwe9rc)
2️⃣ **_North Carolina:_ GOP attacks election results **
In North Carolina, a court ruling is paving the way to overturn the election that put a Democratic Justice on the North Carolina Supreme Court. [This blatant disenfranchisement is incredibly dangerous and the latest Republican attempt to undermine the will of voters → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMRXuNSlhDxcvv3N1sDz0lokSaF92HLStmNZdZsjb7S2C_CLTEt5N5If-pAczD4uqRyvB7Dn7Z0t_7qyKR7ov5mpF7rYWV0sr0IZS7MCo201aPp4zDcEH18xuYqR24NgweCKW7b9zkqtHkiaa7JkVU9ePR2McbxEXT77RTDvP6pVKIEN_3NcixMeFdbwpioD7_q2kykhpBJwKvrIUblokq24lt0BA79KZygkEs4tz6KIgLB4Fj6hJJ_Uj7y6edRsTWahdmSG0RySnwlwc8iOgm3MGxhw4fFbLtTNhdpwx7FPP5II9FLfThLgAb5OBn2KwLzSfisO2tOi3sD3Drhb8BZlTFSGA8RFJwAXGsTvE3dWgGIdsMkWzq9dYoX5f-p7OqM7CC1oyj15Ho-bxl8w8crCy17cEbJX1F0j4NpJ5r6qBjyWNQ59iVmlVtElo5_saBZtnR-pTo6G3YRSzh6GEP-ZRyP8nJKQ-7vfB1sbJgr70gIjl2q7ojr8zqyNePZWt4AfigQ9cF1CX_jocnbZlqyXuxs1CJinhO70yRv5V19Zmydpi8oPVlF7W05ZjckRlY-7AmcEIp8kPxQGDOP8k1SA/4ft/O1xWs_vdRAiwOJ8d2YLKEQ/h2/h001.fAIouIvGffhhTH2Cepvq_0EciMnOjw-ZKeFXN-TtT_w)
📖 **_Read:_ State Republicans continue to push the envelope with the most extreme attacks on abortion **
The most extreme attacks on reproductive freedom are coming from state legislatures, with dangerous ripple effects. With chaos at the federal level already stoking fear in communities across the country, people are asking for stability and support, not for Republicans to test the limits of their extremism. [Read our full press release here → ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.yjJN_MEbNx94PLaWzZ6hW5urRMpuKreY0_4KS0xJ1pCI8KnEf9ng3q5Ut3pZIxT3Kci1kOFhTGzniefLoyhWbwRnJWIVdgXKMnfoeG60e2RI8vVIyW7g3wN9esul_DB3ouQ85Z4YsO-iLq1j8XybIwzlHmFuqvRlbWVvFrXEFzdlgANi2APm2MRwW9X0G_fE7xgU6mZFjV_75yn3e8DAnvbH-8aQKgSE1irmsD69Dtlzv9dUQK26CXK6Jk4VteGasMwNkRHySE5bVZYqjK5E-nWeC_cywIzHOX4SR-LyfCwV8SgAQiRkKQ3s3X8D3N_juIvwvrQs8q3nhL37itcULjsa_vyBCKvk764HvZmnV2T8WcLkEhQYcj-4T6VKAxn9UwG1ndkMR7nq6e6UCnL7pRr23hIbz9ZVRKTVPRAYuMri20MVY4YznZIrBHVT3YYH1ybzhAXxhzvh_f2zcCQHs7l1ctQjaRLvaSv1QgkCTlaHsfhcBCnvZUJWempL8t4QUgQbeTH7ttMZORfH9GoGpOIa-DJLfpEit0wcaOMHOe3b5TTYAjhse6h_09TFpIA7KXA0gTQf3W9SnAYK-79yWdSU1jWZsfZ4EBlWQsOCsakCwQOgLzd2K43oKAZ2m70V/4ft/O1xWs_vdRAiwOJ8d2YLKEQ/h3/h001.FqVJcMARA5IeQUK7I7mpZwDIctY4DQ5NxM1r08xUZ38)
🫏 **_Join the fight:_ Become an Official DLCC Member **
If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. [**Join our team today →**](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDThSmlGL5SZKXg4BDovnS04gHNgK48n_8LBY9zspddgGfB-uhrIBE-3-kIvmDDcMomusvOMDVbfT9yuJJ_5UtgFLcjJ0WorkEPsmuykgfeYOCzz_UjcfbCKAoNaeL_Da7-1DUhWnZuDipccUX4v1iQCJOyvubKYeUedMCeDdLUKDzFhemUDpA5kufCEw_DZipxMUEx_5Mn-nPjsbP_-wn3ahMCRISe1p847gSG6QgybaTT9bSrhmc_pudKBtMkTlfgomxpCPt72BAD-dDbiG7lv4EA2iUsJmft0mEXu_6VePO77Ca93Km-EvcPEMxFVNAnmPu6fbpSqKWmVuNXH5AgJOuMrB0n8eHI6uN3_t2or1rIxysbp5CmM059gzIjk0myrK0kkN0nx3FkHtYypA1RvhW_NtZ3yWRWKmHxtyQcWWjXeV0M2v5rqEjE1FxVnijDwRuGkF8kKQEYtqVA2ndr52i60VKYGEqvGmZibs_yw_vvqMWmUPeOF2QV2-m3ah2w4MIF-URQzBf8-sM9qGjZg/4ft/O1xWs_vdRAiwOJ8d2YLKEQ/h4/h001.RIOxEhNXcR_1jPGHE9qBNtIVjrOolBwbFxIw5fMFWOU)
**🗳️ _Upcoming elections:_ Democrats work to build progressive power **
State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. clean_body: Here's the latest edition of the DLCC's newsletter for Sunday, April 20th, 2025. | | | | | | 1️⃣ Nevada: State Dems advance bill to criminalize election subversion efforts Following Nevada Republicans’ fake electors scheme that attempted to subvert the 2020 election results, state Democrats advanced a bill to criminalize these efforts in order to safeguard our free and fair elections. 2️⃣ North Carolina: GOP attacks election results In North Carolina, a court ruling is paving the way to overturn the election that put a Democratic Justice on the North Carolina Supreme Court. 📖 Read: State Republicans continue to push the envelope with the most extreme attacks on abortion The most extreme attacks on reproductive freedom are coming from state legislatures, with dangerous ripple effects. With chaos at the federal level already stoking fear in communities across the country, people are asking for stability and support, not for Republicans to test the limits of their extremism. 🫏 Join the fight: Become an Official DLCC Member If you’re looking for a way to take back your agency against the GOP power surge and help chart the path forward, we hope you’ll join our team by becoming a DLCC member. 🗳️ Upcoming elections: Democrats work to build progressive power State Democrats are facing over a dozen elections in the coming months. ****** | | ---|---|--- | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Eric Burlison
subject: Christ is King. Do you agree?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress
body:
[](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/oDYBq_oPOb9l1EObTUUezsoBEcq0sMgQlfgpleD8MMC-bcHdzVCesdvXMddnymoKtpWnBirLuAY9pQni-vB-ggbtk2weYa7GBzxiPMuFJP5g3-lQZRqCEwjBP-ZNsUEOHO0wR81FSPZO51sb_xQUuieeFX0B28FHKl43Ra7jLqpkaXm2dxEDPVFODTWPnkN8PaSYStfr8mQGzek6vl7J3QHwEkqbgjb3cTrc2RgS_SnDZ_7hAgb3K7A1IpAqsGdjpywYrW4G3w5kKtCe7aen40yWOPyEniqDHkJV1NfGoZiVSNsQ-zoiixuCWs3E_UZbWrcKbE66BkMQXoTPO7jiS2pvQJXXNJ4yqRXyO6JCvMisOb8hk8XnmywnibI8dBuPanLNJ-dzTXLFu3qmZL65M1r-06R7KiAJpJAP8SA0jVhRatNLwWCbZIHwb3gC-DMuU-dREWWtNqLGTikkdXsLHOBpq03tzdetOV3886ANH6CPJsb9bl6CrScbs4k/xWpG292U9FTSGVphtS3LuzXlUkG0V1We/8)

**
**
**Peter, --Congressman Eric Burlison here. **

I don't say this lightly. I say it because I believe it with every fiber of my being:

**Christ is King.

**

In a culture that mocks truth, in a world that celebrates confusion, this simple truth makes the elites tremble.

The woke Left is trying to erase Christianity from public life.

They hate our values.

They despise our faith.

They want to see Christians _silenced_ --in schools, in culture, and yes, in Congress.

But **I will never bow.

**
Not to the mob.

Not to the lies.

And certainly not to a radical agenda trying to drive God out of America.

I'm here to say enough is enough.

👉 **There are TWO genders.
****
**👉**Christian values BUILT this nation.
****
**👉**We will NOT be bullied into silence.

**
I'm proud to serve in Congress as a [**Christian conservative, a family man, and a fighter for faith and freedom.** ](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/C3IRIrjKuOt-Ifzz2VwEp22HWXQ20tgZWbLLXHZRwLXYIX8xTmLPGbSV0BbTuw6gvUhw6idFIhUl7r32sF3TyAqy3LJfXy_Gtaxo2sXNvPnsuKzNwng8cZZ7JSYAR57kCtQPfuQ3xV6SLaW_jNYV3Fk57W2ccyMVEMeeiB3mfbqi-uLwpU-xzjKVvp1av-PCK_C5382KNL8xnWu8b73J5dLWEhMbj_8TTBAMTJeh6bkfBYSt9w6jP7nPSLafdcwsLTN-Ku3sXIx2q2zgrQ6Jer9mU20kxCABsrdB-vb_VaEyqoXibxrhlFzUR6VyIkvaKsJCpwjvsrmR0NAcQIsDcOd6gpeowhWpdaJcwuw2CyVJsfVt8ILwfmJhxokAcmdA0ALX18gryKo7XSZqD1Dj8SFfTebUIcv6q3ajmgQvEj71Cbi7MaWnDyQFhiNwmZu34pFw5sr1XN5kxt9eUVOnV-byQFl_ZvUyDVRWAZYZZ5nFtFIkNUbGeY8C_C0/1qrH3Xf4tc3LNckpeT5cKBtKqoY-4mqD/8)But I can't do it alone.

If you believe--as I do--that Christ is Lord...

And if you believe that this message deserves a VOICE in Washington...

Then I'm asking you to do two things:

🙏 **First: say a prayer for our country. We need it now more than ever.
****
****
**✍️**Second: Add your name and stand with me as I fight to protect Christian values in Congress.**

[YES--CHRIST IS LORD. I STAND WITH REP. BURLISON ](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/1auIFolxJQN20RFUUcJb8x02412DnLb5I2wsXgV7WDdK-9TKqn2nF5gjao4YyibIPZ4RblDV4tWDaTmwDpKR4Iir9LpqnhZTZdo1mPFXeMrylNx3LjUoJlQSBXWcDxJqQV9yxFdzGGcDBvMdsKRWLamnnlH286jMFiQuEghb06zXJ7sy2dLpyyVOAz4U4vS4O-QU-_7j_xl3pNdTMpTw93-7gLSCTsRobQP39XJKru0Ck_DEQC3psbZStRTowi5BIX02ryLmzkeD2Md5iIHsgBy2yANWQtoMy-luSZo_Qs77WXcF904LQ4yYEBuRfq7UIPko_2DkYEVTvJQJGP1a8yd83_1hN6ONY_nz3VpdHueTvlmTfiMvaaWDk5Na69oyFDoB7PGiilojP5V0jkiAHYW1bkLEoFb_bQjXWY0IgHMq74hlA_szUe3D_rl1dwUc_5HYhoDWvybIm_J5WQJc6D1skTnDr9_NvEvIz8FKu5E72sPJHnJ9blrrYPA/UBC77S6AQfwdkXXzSIoj_yaWeXP0uXaS/8)

With faith,

**Eric Burlison

**
Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress

clean_body: Peter, --Congressman Eric Burlison here. I don't say this lightly. I say it because I believe it with every fiber of my being: Christ is King. In a culture that mocks truth, in a world that celebrates confusion, this simple truth makes the elites tremble. The woke Left is trying to erase Christianity from public life. They hate our values. They despise our faith. They want to see Christians silenced --in schools, in culture, and yes, in Congress. But I will never bow. Not to the mob. Not to the lies. And certainly not to a radical agenda trying to drive God out of America. I'm here to say enough is enough. 👉 There are TWO genders. 👉Christian values BUILT this nation. 👉We will NOT be bullied into silence. I'm proud to serve in Congress as a I can't do it alone. If you believe--as I do--that Christ is Lord... And if you believe that this message deserves a VOICE in Washington... Then I'm asking you to do two things: 🙏 First: say a prayer for our country. We need it now more than ever. ✍️Second: Add your name and stand with me as I fight to protect Christian values in Congress. With faith, Eric Burlison Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. # He is Risen
### A Prayer for Easter Sunday
Father,
The grave is empty. The stone is rolled away. And death has lost its grip.
“He is not here; for He is risen, as He said.” (Matthew 28:6)
This is the morning that changed everything. The silence of Saturday has given way to the shout of victory.
Jesus Christ has risen from the dead — and with Him, hope rose too.
Thank You for the cross. Thank You for the blood. But today, we thank You for the breakthrough.
For the morning light. For the joy that cannot be buried.
Let this resurrection joy rise in us. Let it shake off the weight of sorrow. Let it silence the voice of fear. Let it stir again what we thought was lost.
Today we remember the women who ran to the tomb— expecting to mourn, but encountering glory.
We remember the angel who spoke with power:
“Do not be afraid... He is risen from the dead.” (Matthew 28:5–6)
We remember the trembling disciples who were met not with shame, but with peace.
Let us carry that same message into our world — not a religion of rules, but a Savior who walked out of the grave and still walks with us today.
Let this Easter not be routine. Let it be revival. Let joy rise higher than our doubts.
Let hope burn brighter than our past. Let love run deeper than our pain.
Because Jesus lives — we live.
Because He overcame — we overcome.
Because He rose — we rise too.
This is not just history. This is the heartbeat of everything we believe.
And we declare it with everything we are:
He is risen. He is risen, indeed.
In the name of the Risen King — Jesus Christ,
Amen
_~ a prayer written by Gregg Phillips_

clean_body: Rejoice! He is Risen Indeed! | | | | April 20, 2025 | | Rejoice! He is Risen Indeed! | | | | | | | | He is Risen A Prayer for Easter Sunday Father, The grave is empty. The stone is rolled away. And death has lost its grip. “He is not here; for He is risen, as He said.” (Matthew 28:6) This is the morning that changed everything. The silence of Saturday has given way to the shout of victory. Jesus Christ has risen from the dead — and with Him, hope rose too. Thank You for the cross. Thank You for the blood. But today, we thank You for the breakthrough. For the morning light. For the joy that cannot be buried. Let this resurrection joy rise in us. Let it shake off the weight of sorrow. Let it silence the voice of fear. Let it stir again what we thought was lost. Today we remember the women who ran to the tomb— expecting to mourn, but encountering glory. We remember the angel who spoke with power: “Do not be afraid... He is risen from the dead.” (Matthew 28:5–6) We remember the trembling disciples who were met not with shame, but with peace. Let us carry that same message into our world — not a religion of rules, but a Savior who walked out of the grave and still walks with us today. Let this Easter not be routine. Let it be revival. Let joy rise higher than our doubts. Let hope burn brighter than our past. Let love run deeper than our pain. Because Jesus lives — we live. Because He overcame — we overcome. Because He rose — we rise too. This is not just history. This is the heartbeat of everything we believe. And we declare it with everything we are: He is risen. He is risen, indeed. In the name of the Risen King — Jesus Christ, Amen ~ a prayer written by Gregg Phillips | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Update your email preferences or unsubscribe (C) 2025 True the Vote 3120 Southwest Frwy Ste 101, PMB 19128 Houston, Texas 77098-4520, United States of America

Final opportunity before this weekend’s deadline? >>

| Hi team,

Last week, we sent you an urgent petition to stand with the USPS as Trump attempts to take it over in his scheme to dissolve and privatize it!

**Our records indicate that you have not signed it** – and we’re reaching out again because with postal workers protesting against the Trump administration's agenda, it’s critical that we take advantage of this momentum!

Not only is Trump’s scheme to privatize the USPS a likely violation of the law, **it’s a direct attack on the millions of Americans who rely on it for medication, Social Security benefits, and mail-in voting.**

name: Yadira Caraveo
subject: I’m running for Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89176?t=6&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD) Hi friend, I want you to be one of the first to know:

**I’m officially running for Congress to win back Colorado’s 8th District.**

I was proud to be the first person to represent Colorado’s 8th – and the first Latina to represent Colorado in Congress.

[**I’ll explain more about why I’m running, but if you’re with me, will you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and me to get our campaign off the ground? This will be one of the most competitive House races in the country, so every dollar makes a difference.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89176?t=7&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD) | [DONATE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89176?t=8&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
---
Let me start from the beginning: my parents’ dream.

My parents came to this country from a small town in Mexico. They didn’t come with much, but they came in search of the American Dream. They raised me to believe that with hard work, perseverance, and care for others, anything was possible. That belief led me to become the first in my family to graduate from college and later, become a pediatrician in Adams County.

But as a doctor, I saw families struggling with the rising costs of healthcare and prescription drugs, and I knew I needed to do more. The American Dream my parents worked so hard for was slipping away for too many.

So, I took that fight to the state legislature and then Congress. I forced Big Pharma to lower prescription prices, helped pass a first-in-the-nation cap on the price of insulin, and pushed to allow Medicare to negotiate lower prices.

**But our representative in Congress, Gabe Evans, is trying to rip away health care from tens of thousands of Coloradans, including the very families I served as a pediatrician.**

I won’t stand by while Gabe Evans makes life harder for working families, all while giving tax cuts to billionaires. So I’m getting back in the ring and running for Congress, and I hope I can count on your support.

[**CO-08 was one of the closest House races in the country in both 2022 and 2024, so if we’re going to win what’s bound to be one of the toughest races in 2026, we need a strong grassroots team from the very beginning. Will you split a donation between the Voter Protection Project and me to help us launch this campaign?**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89176?t=9&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Yadira Caraveo and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89177?t=10&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89178?t=11&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89179?t=12&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89180?t=13&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/89176?t=14&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
Thanks,

Yadira
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=15&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=19578%2E878179%2EFdyUnD)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. name: Team Ilhan
subject: Uncertainty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
People voted for Trump to bring down prices, and instead he is putting a massive tax on many of the goods they rely on.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1600%2E791427%2ER996TH)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250420-1-180&t=2&akid=1600%2E791427%2ER996TH)
Friend — Trump’s chaotic tariffs are causing a lot of economic uncertainty.
People voted for Trump to bring down prices, and instead he is putting a massive tax on many of the goods they rely on.
Economic uncertainty for working families means future plans get put on hold. It means deciding which necessities you can afford and which you have to go without. For many, it’ll mean working more hours or getting even another job.
**Donald Trump doesn’t understand that Americans don’t want tariffs, they want a more affordable life.**
People want to go to the doctor or the hospital and not have to worry about if they can pay the bill. They want their rent to stop skyrocketing through the roof. They want affordable groceries so they can feed their families. They want a fair shot at the promise of working hard and having a good life.
Instead, Trump is playing with our futures while he and his billionaire buddies make a quick buck. It’s wrong, and we’re fighting back.
Ilhan Omar has spent her entire career fighting for the basic necessities we all deserve, like healthcare, housing, education, and more.
We are building a movement that puts those priorities first, while understanding that we must first defeat the threat posed by Donald Trump and his fellow oligarchs.
**[If that sounds good to you, make a contribution today and power our movement. Ilhan is working every day to oppose Trump’s chaos and deliver for working families. She’s hoping you’ll stand by her side by chipping in.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-april25.zbfFse&refcode=em250420-1-180&t=3&akid=1600%2E791427%2ER996TH)

clean_body: People voted for Trump to bring down prices, and instead he is putting a massive tax on many of the goods they rely on. Friend — Trump’s chaotic tariffs are causing a lot of economic uncertainty. People voted for Trump to bring down prices, and instead he is putting a massive tax on many of the goods they rely on. Economic uncertainty for working families means future plans get put on hold. It means deciding which necessities you can afford and which you have to go without. For many, it’ll mean working more hours or getting even another job. Donald Trump doesn’t understand that Americans don’t want tariffs, they want a more affordable life. People want to go to the doctor or the hospital and not have to worry about if they can pay the bill. They want their rent to stop skyrocketing through the roof. They want affordable groceries so they can feed their families. They want a fair shot at the promise of working hard and having a good life. Instead, Trump is playing with our futures while he and his billionaire buddies make a quick buck. It’s wrong, and we’re fighting back. Ilhan Omar has spent her entire career fighting for the basic necessities we all deserve, like healthcare, housing, education, and more. We are building a movement that puts those priorities first, while understanding that we must first defeat the threat posed by Donald Trump and his fellow oligarchs. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | In solidarity, Team Ilhan Omar PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS

name: Team Finstad
subject: Wishing you a Blessed Easter
body:
| | | |
---
| Dear Friend,
---
This Easter, I want to take a moment to say how grateful I am for the families and communities that make southern Minnesota so special.
As we reflect on the hope and promise of this season, I’m keeping you and your loved ones in my prayers.
May your home be filled with peace, joy, and the blessings of new beginnings. God bless, **[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40AggjOJBRcAGNuHlInGjDHhFDlhxxSe5-9Sq388D1hyxPI3HZdA)**[****](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40AggjOJBRcAGNuHlInGjDHhFDlhxxSe5-9Sq388D1hyxPI3HZdA)**[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40AggjuJBNe549Umch2tvwyinf_erZf-JlkCfCK0DvwHenIxXnvk)**[****](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40AggjuJBNe549Umch2tvwyinf_erZf-JlkCfCK0DvwHenIxXnvk)******[](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40Aggj-JBu3HbV3BaZDAv5zkKMdk6dqonmVbUL-vcsxPwOTNMvDo)********[****](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40Aggj-JBu3HbV3BaZDAv5zkKMdk6dqonmVbUL-vcsxPwOTNMvDo)**[********](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQiN4CGIy40Aggj-JBu3HbV3BaZDAv5zkKMdk6dqonmVbUL-vcsxPwOTNMvDo)****

The D.C. elites have sold us out —shipping our coal, lumber, and factory jobs to China. Allowing millions of illegal aliens to take over our neighborhoods and undercut our wages. Wasting our tax dollars overseas while rural America crumbles. West Virginians aren’t the only ones feeling this. Hard-working families are gettingCRUSHED in all 50 states. I’m fighting to fix that. This is the most important race of my life — and it won't be easy. I’m not backed by billionaires or political “experts”. My campaign is 100% powered bypatriots like you. If you’re tired of all of the lies, corruption, and tone-deaf leadership in Washington —I need you in this fight with me. 99% of Republicans will ignore this message. Even fewer will donate. Will you be the 1% who steps up in a major way? $10, $20, or $30 today could change everything. Let’s take our country back and finish what we started under President Trump. THANK YOU FOR YOUR SUPPORT! Derrick Evans Former Biden Regime PrisonerRepublican for U.S. Senate | | Paid for by Evans for WV 50 MOUNTAINEER DRPRICHARD, WV 25555 | | |

name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: Happy Easter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Pelosi for Congress
body:
Happy Easter - Faith, Hope, Charity - Nancy Pelosi [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP42/1/88466/images/20250420_em_ex_b1_np4c_Grassroots.jpg]

Dear Friends,

Renewed by the spirit of Passover this week as we celebrate Easter in San Francisco and around the world, I want to express my gratitude for your friendship and unwavering support of our shared values as our nation faces a time of challenge that calls on each and every one of us to fight for what we believe and look out for one another.

America has always faced challenges — from our founding to today, but the American people have never lost hope in our ability to come together and strive for a more perfect union. In this unprecedented time, we continue to seek and to find hope where it has always been — right between faith and charity.

This Easter and Passover, let us recommit to building a better and brighter future that is worthy of the aspirations of our children and the courage and sacrifice of our men and women in uniform. Together, we will protect the most vulnerable among us, save our health care and protect our freedoms and our Democracy.

Happy Easter from our family to yours! May God bless you and may God bless America.

Faithfully yours,

NANCY
Speaker Emerita Nancy Pelosi is the U.S. Representative for California’s 11th District.
She's fighting to help working families and protect America from the dangerous agenda of House Republicans.
We know you're getting a lot of emails -- but it's only because what we're facing right now as a country is so important.
Nancy is committed to doing whatever it takes to elect a record-breaking number of Democrats in the next election and beyond. Can she count on your support?

name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Columbine
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Enough is enough.
#

Friends,
Today marks the 26-year anniversary of the tragic shooting at Columbine High School. Last year, I attended a vigil in Denver, Colorado where we honored the 13 lives lost.
The pain of losing a loved one to gun violence never truly goes away, no matter how many years pass. Survivors of the Columbine shooting have courageously shared their stories for the last 26 years, and I will always hold them close to my heart.
The fight to end gun violence is a long, hard journey. It is unacceptable that over 394,000 students have experienced gun violence in their schools since Columbine.
Three simple words summarize how I feel about the situation: **Enough is enough.**
We cannot stop in our fight to end gun violence until every student can go to school without the fear of being a victim of a mass shooting.
Since 2013, GIFFORDS has worked to turn pain into action, researching and enacting lifesaving solutions to gun violence. Our team has helped pass hundreds of gun safety laws in 49 states and Washington DC.
Change doesn’t happen overnight. With your support, we can continue working to make our country a better, safer place.
Let’s move ahead together.
Sincerely,
Gabby Giffords
**GIFFORDS PAC works to end gun violence by empowering voters with information and supporting candidates who will fight for safer gun laws.**
[**A contribution to GIFFORDS PAC goes directly towards our work to save lives.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250420-1-b&t=1&akid=10332%2E3935704%2EMVKQ9D)
**[CONTRIBUTE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr25.x-ZdIQ&refcode=em250420-1-b&t=2&akid=10332%2E3935704%2EMVKQ9D)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=10332%2E3935704%2EMVKQ9D) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

# _Happy Easter PolitiBrawlers!_
**A message from President Trump on this joyous holiday:**_**" He is risen"**_
[](https://substack.com/redirect/779059e5-9e2d-4986-8c98-eeee16094968?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
## **Now for today 's debate picks for you to enjoy:**
# Marjorie Taylor Greene EXPLODES at Jasmine Crockett, then ALL HELL breaks loose
In this resurfaced, must-see clip, GOP Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene refuses to take any crap from notorious Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett during a heated exchange of words.
**[It starts quickly and then all HELL breaks loose...](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0d432b-d9c6-45da-a850-844b41c36324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0d432b-d9c6-45da-a850-844b41c36324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0d432b-d9c6-45da-a850-844b41c36324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Greene began to ask a question, prompting Crockett to comment sarcastically, "Do you know what we're here for?"
"I don't think you know what you are here for," Greene quipped back, adding, "I think your fake eyelashes are messing up what you are reading."
That's chaos ensued. Chairman James Comer tried tried to bring the hearing to order, but it was too late.
"That's beneath even you!!" one Democrat shouted out.
"That is absolutely unacceptable, how dare you attack the physical appearance of another person!!" AOC snapped at Greene.
"Oh, are you're feelings hurt?" Greene answered back.
"Oh baby girl!! Don't even play!" AOC yelled back, completely triggered at this point.
"I am not apologizing!" Greene told AOC. "Why don't you debate me?!"
Watch the massive congressional clash here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/9f0d432b-d9c6-45da-a850-844b41c36324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c1c094ca-cd27-4d2b-b4f4-9faa229d1324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
1983 - Motorola released the first commercial phone.
1992 - Nokia turned phones into personal devices.
And when Apple released the first iPhone in 2007, the industry changed forever. But that was 18 years ago...
Another paradigm shift is happening now, and **[Mode Mobile is leading the charge with 32,481% revenue growth](https://substack.com/redirect/c1c094ca-cd27-4d2b-b4f4-9faa229d1324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/c1c094ca-cd27-4d2b-b4f4-9faa229d1324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Their _EarnPhone_ is the only smartphone that pays users for activities like playing games, listening to music and even charging their phone.
But their**current share price of $0.26/share is changing in under two weeks.**
⚠️**[Last Chance - Invest in their EarnPhone before price moves on May 1st.](https://substack.com/redirect/c1c094ca-cd27-4d2b-b4f4-9faa229d1324?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

* * *
# Tom Homan GOES OFF on Morning Joe for defending Abrego Garcia during heated live interview
Trump Border Czar Tom Homan **[put MSNBC's Joe Scarborough in his place](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7a621a-2150-4866-aa55-f94966412474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for saying suspected gang member and illegal immigrant Kilmar Abrego Garcia was wrongfully deported.
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7a621a-2150-4866-aa55-f94966412474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7a621a-2150-4866-aa55-f94966412474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"What's changed since 2019 when the trump administration agreed with a court, get an appelit, and let him be released back to his family and gave him this special protective status?" Scarborough asked Homan.
"He is a designated MS-13 member, who is now designated as a member of a terrorist organization, where the withholding no longer applies, at least in our opinion," Homan answered. "We'll continue to litigate it but I think we removed a bad guy from this country who is now home, in the custody of his country."
Watch the tense interview here:
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0a7a621a-2150-4866-aa55-f94966412474?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

name: James Carville
subject: I'm about to talk your ear off >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hey y'all, it's James Carville here. I won't lie, I'm about to talk your freakin' ear off -- but you need to hear every bit of it. **If you need to cut out early, here's the gist:**

We need the Senate back. ASAP. The GOP won't just roll over and let us win, so I have to ask: **[Will you chip in $5 before our midnight deadline to fight for a Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250420-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250420-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20078%2E9716520%2Eo7a-i5)**

_Here are the two most important things you need to know now:_

**DEMOCRATS HAVE A STRONG SHOT AT TAKING BACK THE SENATE.**

We've got BIG special elections coming in Ohio and Florida. A _weak_ GOP majority on defense. Loads of Trump's lackeys up for re-election. **Do I say it'll be "easy"? Hell no. Do I say it's right there if we fight for it? HELL YEAH!**

_But here's the snag in our strategy:_

**REPUBLICANS ARE CHOMPING AT THE BIT TO OUTSPEND US.**

Republicans just shelled out over _half a billion dollars_ to take _away_ our majority -- and they sure as heck won't hold back now that they're in power. Right-wing special interest groups and MAGA megadonors will pour _millions_ more into bankrolling the GOP.

_So here's the bottom line:_ Our early investments will be game-changing to compete with their cashflow and fight for _every_ opportunity on the map.

Time is our most valuable resource. **I'm not gonna just sit around and let the MAGA-elite have their way -- and I don't think you want to, either.**

**[We need to win BIG, y'all, so I'm asking you directly: Will you pitch in $5 to fight for the Senate and combat the GOP's megadonor machine? Any amount (not kidding) TONIGHT will stick it to Trump's MAGA cronies >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21369?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20250420-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20250420-JamesCarville-CarvilleLongFormFR-Pros-sl1&akid=20078%2E9716520%2Eo7a-i5)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

James Carville

name: Rep. Nancy Mace
subject: From making waffles to making history.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Mace
body:
| | | [](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/eN_Uwdr8D0D_TJfOkE8PLf7uBpe6RbKE62-jz82k0zIC_raCJQPmUKAS8mtGzShvXpBJAx5YBpRLWcqY8hVVUCGcn-ZGNVkDFlDfGorUvpmOOlyejxWk7YfaKG8yqrsSOc83ZKlPvvI16KrASQje7t-iZm4XN7Sq4sEI7mCOs5aGc7q1qZDhHTlyNcyhOf97kgYhcGjRyojlItBJvQEU8l4rMjuDKv1jITWt5kAdTE7pGOicCYOkQg1oo7TYQ-RFnmTref3vNO0bmNhz_vyO-4ZNPZOajC8Fy49lYVr_uHyk2X1PFPBMdkbyiKMF8x9T6_C8bBrgpQ-WvoUF5zG74BWyxGBz8kaauitkB-kTtGHiG8iQeTlThkE7_Xvk4og-gMeupLQQi4Pdy7UZve3b1TGMV5u1UideJRp4-JmSoioUSz6iZI6l5c0B1mu7l9akTk4I66gzFauFguCNdjedR17-gfj_ZCHhc4golre7U4w0-uMc_Io/T7rOW2xGE5fQtj1gm2GewmbCP4s_6s_K/8)
---
| | _**At 17, I dropped out of high school. **_
---
[](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/LzauKW3Pv2z7sFhPvHTCaAWOO7_AECq0mtMH8yp5u30pc74bgJ-po_oGT0aQ1nMQrgiAeG80MYXoZfb0Nn8XHGksGEg7rrRdVrTLcVPwxadpK1JvdstUy-wqNOCu9bO64VPOo2bRPKfnvwb7DOzFDkJnsY2aAKcrAthjCLcOQ8WlDho3x-AYkFs532g0xpboxKWHeJ3LPrryHp07KoNxvV1Kq-GeUlLEEmx1FlMOteqqyfDXXoYG3JOuUJyRMN5lTcdo5zVeBN8toMumgeJyy-0CXK84Ky-dGR8_1_zaGqmq69myF8bARStXU8JMrVTJ3pEM38v8qbvMWpN7Fw9PITPU8c5opOW2fJwe-dRwzlCbwyFYueYbUjrCd8-Ryw0zqi3OuHJ2UCGKOfQqB8AQJ13y_ehVJXEnVPlRmTiUYw8rGatp7ZwJStKl3slD8y0ETKDYF4oqw1A010BX754DCQFBGb7cHNCgCIRvjP19yEzgV2ku-1w/teqo68VShROH07hnHSb1tIO-vX6etbHR/8)
---
My parents — a tough Army General and an even tougher schoolteacher — gave me two choices: __**go back to school, or get a job.**__ So I went to work... at a fine-dining establishment some of you may know as Waffle House. Graveyard shift. Sticky floors. And no silver spoons. Just a spatula, grit, and God's grace. That wasn’t my destination — just the beginning. _**25 years ago, I made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel.**_ A campus where we _**SALUTE the flag**_ — we don’t burn it. _**[Now, I’m a single mom, a two-term Congresswoman, and the first Republican woman EVER elected from South Carolina.](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/xloOMPl-jH0uI-Y5KFQCV1uEuT5k8DKqcPufOqwVoEVa748XrrA7Kizg54vOx8CHdCw02wojPXc7RxF_XHm0r56W43b_tjBpNXJLAxeUTB2dM1-pu6CC-SRehMRsTLWuIDV2N7sHwIUylLnsMrTOuCR9zUYQbHBpxhxI32-TJxp3xGRzl1MGxTSssSePeLLJG4slfo9kPj4koKJA0uPFRtZ5iEZ9X3mm_9VquTjZmiNDy6BZyolhrChN0PREVfsksBEuFsQIly98HKN6zwCEmXdtBFGDwPvFSzDZ-rAd0uwwPyDJQvEmIBXEEQ93tEE8m79Mi9YzTOTiaBA16Z9i3fvIuwRA-60t2oJvUOfN8hZZSN4qxvvWQdRu1apcbfS0JoD41rnzi2SBPRxF0Yx4hHKsuPvLIbrejbgB9FnhpATRKmSfPvTQr1Ljohu_s0YMqyCZfis6H7rsh5k7dn90ZIBZCzHrm1Oh9sNx39Oxu7bN9Q_78ys/_4SQsUIeuvjdBeB6kQx0T_CfrjDpGmaw/8)**_ _I didn’t get here because of connections._ I got here the hard way. name: Deb Haaland
subject: This news hurts.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let me tell you why these attacks on our public education hit close to home for me.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)
If you haven’t already heard by now, Donald Trump and his unelected billionaire sidekick Elon Musk are taking a sledgehammer to the Department of Education.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250420_1_edu?refcode=em20250420-1408&:amount=5&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)
_I know it can feel overwhelming to keep up with the news. This is too important to ignore._
But that’s not the only blow to New Mexico’s public schools.
**Just days ago, the Trump Administration pulled the plug on New Mexico’s extension to spend education-related pandemic relief dollars.** That means essential funding we were counting on – for after-school programs, heating, ventilation, air conditioning improvements, and food – is suddenly off the table.
Trump’s attacks on our public education hit close to home for me. Let me tell you why:
**These moves hurt students all across New Mexico.** New Mexico has made important strides in public education, especially in early childhood. But now the federal support that our schools rely on to ensure that every student succeeds is on the chopping block.
**It hurts low income children like my Somah.** When it was time for Somah to attend preschool, I had no idea how I’d cover the costs. Luckily, I found a school that allowed parents to volunteer cleaning up classrooms in exchange for a discount on tuition. It wasn’t always easy, but it was the only way I could have afforded to send them to preschool.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250420_1_edu?refcode=em20250420-1408&:amount=5&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)
_I cleaned up my child’s preschool to reduce the bill._
**It hurts people like me, who’ve taken on student loans.** Believe it or not, I still owe tens of thousands in student loans. I made the decision to take on debt to attend undergrad and law school at UNM, and I swear, some days it feels like I’ll be paying them down forever. People across the country are getting crushed by the weight of student debt, and cutting the Department of Education further endangers critical funding for higher education access.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250420_1_edu?refcode=em20250420-1408&:amount=5&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)
_The day I graduated from UNM in 1994. 30 years later, I’m still paying down student loans._
**I am running for governor because I have lived the struggles that too many people across this country currently face, and I’m determined to fix what’s broken.** Our children are relying on us to fight for a bright future for them, and that’s what our campaign is about. I know that with Trump in the White House it can feel overwhelming, or like the odds are stacked against us. But if we come together, I know we will win.
**[If you can, will you rush a $5 donation to our grassroots campaign? By contributing, you’ll be directly supporting our fight to build a future where all New Mexicans can access a good education.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250420_1_edu?amount=5&refcode=em20250420-1408&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250420_1_edu?amount=5&refcode=em20250420-1408&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)**
Be fierce,
Deb
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_footer?refcode=em20250420-1&t=2&refcode2=1408_400544_B_cmyn&akid=1408%2E400544%2EB_cmyn)**
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:

name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Stop the Sell-Off — Keep Public Lands in Public Hands
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIzOTQ3MTIS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjIwMDI3NTUxNwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter: https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/z9e0fza- Tell Congress:

Stop the Sell-Off — Keep Public Lands in Public Hands Despite the overwhelming support for national public lands, attempts to sell
them off to states and private entities are gaining momentum.

Tell your members of Congress to protect public lands and stand against sell-off >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/RZbkcRzX3_ https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~ Peter, Like millions of Americans, public lands are important to my health and
wellbeing. From national parks and monuments, to national wildlife refuges,
wilderness areas, and seashores, these lands provide so much to so many. Public lands have social and health benefits, providing spaces to spend time in
nature — which has been proven to improve both physical and mental health — and
participate in activities like hiking, biking, camping, hunting, fishing,
foraging, skiing, and sightseeing. Public lands also provide boosts to local
economies, as visitors patronize nearby small businesses. Despite the overwhelmingsupport for national public lands, attempts to sell them off to corporate
entities are gaining momentum. Trump and his Republican allies are proposing to
sell our public lands to private interests and corporate polluters — a potential
loss of hundreds of millions of acres of lands that we use to hike, fish, hunt, camp, and conserve. We can’t let that happen, Peter, and together we can stop them in their
tracks. Urge your member of Congress: Oppose ANY efforts to sell our public lands. https://links.messages.lcv. National public lands are lands owned and managed by the federal government for the people. Spanning approximately 640 million acres,they safeguard important historical and cultural sites, provide spaces for
outdoor recreation, and sustain our clean water resources. And all the while,
they are generating $45 billion in economic output and nearly 400,000 jobs. Peter, we need to stop Trump and Republicans from selling off our
public lands to the highest bidder. Losing millions of acres in public land
would be detrimental to our health, wildlife, and local economies. Tell Congress: Stop the sell-off — keep public lands in public hands >> https://links.messages.lcv. Onward, America Fitzpatrick
Conservation Program Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12394712&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDI3NTUxNwS2&spReportId=MjIwMDI3NTUxNwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12394712&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjIwMDI3NTUxNwS2&spReportId=MjIwMDI3NTUxNwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.
clean_body: To view this mail in a browser, copy into your browser. Peter: Tell Congress: Stop the Sell-Off — Keep Public Lands in Public Hands Despite the overwhelming support for national public lands, attempts to sell them off to states and private entities are gaining momentum. Tell your members of Congress to protect public lands and stand against sell-off >> Peter, Like millions of Americans, public lands are important to my health and wellbeing. From national parks and monuments, to national wildlife refuges, wilderness areas, and seashores, these lands provide so much to so many. Public lands have social and health benefits, providing spaces to spend time in nature — which has been proven to improve both physical and mental health — and participate in activities like hiking, biking, camping, hunting, fishing, foraging, skiing, and sightseeing. Public lands also provide boosts to local economies, as visitors patronize nearby small businesses. Despite the overwhelmingsupport for national public lands, attempts to sell them off to corporate entities are gaining momentum. Trump and his Republican allies are proposing to sell our public lands to private interests and corporate polluters — a potential loss of hundreds of millions of acres of lands that we use to hike, fish, hunt, camp, and conserve. We can’t let that happen, Peter, and together we can stop them in their tracks. Urge your member of Congress: Oppose ANY efforts to sell our public lands. National public lands are lands owned and managed by the federal government for the people. Spanning approximately 640 million acres,they safeguard important historical and cultural sites, provide spaces for outdoor recreation, and sustain our clean water resources. And all the while, they are generating $45 billion in economic output and nearly 400,000 jobs. Peter, we need to stop Trump and Republicans from selling off our public lands to the highest bidder. Losing millions of acres in public land would be detrimental to our health, wildlife, and local economies. Tell Congress: Stop the sell-off — keep public lands in public hands >> Onward, America Fitzpatrick Conservation Program Director League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | **🚨 CLIMATE CRISIS ALERT! 🚨**

Trump and his cronies expect us to foot the bill for over **$170 billion in handouts to the fossil fuel industry**. Meanwhile, the climate crisis is destroying homes, lives, and communities.

Enough is enough! [Add your name RIGHT NOW and demand accountability for corporate polluters.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106178392/540683624/-422732860?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FjYmFiOC0wMzFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R00vq0zGDgUfaefMFR5XjJByKb8BxieNOX4uyV7EvEY=&emci=a215eccc-cf1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23acbab8-031e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)

Folks, during his 2024 campaign, Trump made sure to get in good with fossil fuel executives. They gave _millions_ of dollars in political contributions last year. In exchange, the fossil fuel industry’s allies in Congress have been instructed by those same executives to enrich Big Oil at the expense of American consumers and taxpayers.
If Trump and his cronies get their way, **we’ll be footing the bill for over $170 billion in handouts to the fossil fuel industry over the next decade.**
Here’s what these handouts could look like:
* Huge tax breaks for the oil and gas industry
* Auctioning off public land and resources for drilling
* Diminishing competition for the fossil fuel industry from renewable sources

Every single one of these handout schemes is outdated, inefficient, and a waste of our tax dollars. After all the progress we’ve made for our climate, Trump and his cronies are prepared to set us back decades.
American resources should benefit American people, not large-scale polluters. We can’t let Congress sanction these handouts. Our communities, our climate, and our wallets just can’t afford it.
[If you’re with us, sign the petition TODAY to demand accountability for corporate polluters.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106178394/540683626/-422732860?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2FjYmFiOC0wMzFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R00vq0zGDgUfaefMFR5XjJByKb8BxieNOX4uyV7EvEY=&emci=a215eccc-cf1b-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=23acbab8-031e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=6787172)
