Yesterday I attended one of the 750+ nationwide pro-democracy rallies held on April 19. This movement is not slowing down. If anything, it's just getting started. I was in Batavia, Illinois, surrounded by folks who came not for spectacle, not for a selfie--but to fight fascism, defend democracy, and hold our leaders accountable. The rally was entirely peaceful, deeply patriotic, and charged with righteous urgency.
Here are the three biggest takeaways I heard from protestors--and they're worth your attention.. **Let 's Address This.**
**I am doing everything in my power to raise awareness on human rights and justice. I cannot do it alone. I hope you consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..GmMMZISFIRz8mhHmZg8ENfCRm3rGnoaCjssyrUqgpfY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161713199)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8295b35e-475c-42b0-9a94-6d26084a71a2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **1\. People are furious at MAGA extremism --and fed up with Republican cowardice**
There's a difference between political disagreement and moral collapse. MAGA extremism has long crossed that line, and everyone I spoke with knows it. But what especially enraged folks wasn't just Donald Trump's descent into authoritarianism--it was the silence and cowardice from the GOP.
One protestor said to me, "Even Alaska Senator Lisa Murkowski admits she's afraid of Trump. She knows he's dangerous, but she's too scared to vote against him." That fear--legitimized by elected officials--is fueling public anger. Not just because MAGA loyalists are running toward fascism, but because the people who _could_ stop them are running away from responsibility. People are paying attention, and they're outraged.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e0ae5045-b371-491f-99f7-9ccaaf7abcab?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **2\. People are disillusioned with corporate Democrats who refuse to rise to the moment**
It wasn't just Republicans catching heat at the rally. Plenty of folks were angry with Democratic leadership, too--especially the corporate Democrats who offer tweets when the moment demands action.
"Where's the urgency?" one woman asked. "Where's the leadership?"
Several folks specifically contrasted Senator Chris Van Hollen's actions with Senator Chuck Schumer's inaction. Van Hollen flew to El Salvador to support his constituent, Kilmar Abrego Garcia, after the Supreme Court unanimously ruled that Garcia was wrongfully deported. Meanwhile, Schumer hasn't done much beyond post online.
The message was clear: people don't want performative politics. They want fighters. They want leaders who don't just campaign on justice, but show up for it in the real world. And they're hungry for new leadership that takes this existential crisis seriously.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/72d91821-e3da-4bdf-b3d3-e4b28e579a26?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **3\. People are showing up --and they're not going away.**
Here's the part that gave me real hope: nearly half the people at the Batavia rally told me this was their _first_ pro-democracy protest. That's no small thing.
Yes, I'd be lying if I said it wasn't frustrating that many folks waited this long to get involved. But we're in this to build--not to shame. Each person is on their own journey, and I'm glad they're here now. Their voices matter, and their presence shows this isn't a niche movement--it's a growing, multigenerational, multiracial, grassroots fight to save democracy.
And those who _have_ been in the fight longer? They welcomed newcomers with open arms. I saw seasoned organizers sharing resources, encouraging folks to stay engaged, and reminding everyone: this is a marathon, not a sprint.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/26077ddc-e82d-405b-b166-7871004d8ef9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
## **Conclusion: The Fire Is Lit --Now We Build**
April 19 was not just a day of protest--it was a line in the sand. A declaration that we will not sit silently while authoritarianism metastasizes in America. That we refuse to be ruled by fear, apathy, or billionaire-funded propaganda.
The energy I witnessed in Batavia is real, and it's rising. But energy alone isn't enough--we need organization, sustained action, and courage.
If you were at a rally on April 19, thank you. If you couldn't be there, but care deeply about this country, your voice still matters. Raise it. Use it. Support those who are fighting for justice every day.
And if you're looking for ways to stay informed and engaged--follow, support, and amplify independent platforms like mine. I write daily on the issues corporate media refuses to cover. Subscribe [here](https://substack.com/redirect/891bdc27-442a-48df-87f5-19db2b15fbc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) for free, or if you're able, chip in $6/month to help keep this work going.
Together, we will keep showing up. Together, we will keep holding the line. And together, we will defeat fascism with the power of justice, compassion, and community.
**If you find value in these critical updates that corporate media ignores, join our movement for justice and subscribe.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..GmMMZISFIRz8mhHmZg8ENfCRm3rGnoaCjssyrUqgpfY?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=161713199)
## P.S. Resharing Calls to Action from Past Posts
Here's how to build on this momentum:
✅ [Call your Members of Congress](https://substack.com/redirect/a446c7f9-5b70-4ec5-b462-a875160e4727?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and demand they refuse all billionaire and corporate PAC money. Tell them you will not vote for them if they choose billionaires over democracy.
✅ Support people-powered candidates in your community who run on justice, not wealth. When they ask you for support, ask if they are 100% people funded. If they're not, they don't deserve your support because they are telling you they won't listen to you anyway.
✅ Share this message with your networks--and don't let corporate media bury the truth. Especially if you attended a rally (even if you didn't) make sure everyone you know has these next steps in mind.
Let me be explicitly clear--I am not suggesting you don't vote. On the contrary, I am proudly and loudly calling on you to vote in every single election without exception, but do not give away your vote to politicians funded by the very billionaires and billion dollar corporations destroying our democracy. Vote for the people funded candidates working hard to protect our democracy. That's how we save our republic.
Finally, subscribe to independent voices like mine who speak truth to power and refuse to be bought. As billionaires continue to buy out major media, voices like this platform can continue to speak truth to power--but only with your support. My platform, _Let 's Address This_, is proudly people-funded. I don't take corporate money. I write daily on human rights issues that corporate media refuses to cover. You can [subscribe for free or support with $6/month](https://substack.com/redirect/891bdc27-442a-48df-87f5-19db2b15fbc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--whatever works for you.
But more than anything, I'm grateful for your trust, compassion, and commitment to justice. Let's keep building this movement, together.
**Let's Address This is made possibly by you --the thoughtful person reading this. Add your email below and subscribe to our movement for justice.**

Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).

body:
Dear Peter,

In times like these, when darkness tries to cloud our great nation, we must remember the One who holds it all together -- _**[Almighty God](http://links.americabrigade.com/s/c/17f98dm0e_jku8lDauBiyB6U0qs_DBH5f7wXL1o_q_XtAazTet4YqYJDZWI9dck_N-Q9xQ_QYEad62qRYlahysak_w3dCY3EJ1YQa2-AF-r9sJ7RfOArH92-xYU5Vh6S-DKoUIV7_jWGaiVJvTot2Xq6PQ2r_O4NtZJiH5gstQmWumxFFb6-yhQxInTmvNDh_pSdQA0nkVOdCwDKdj1UebLWk6d7ry4zimIkuEqOj-k95dvqGUc6NNnqa1J1umnvtJXOsW7IKHXvl-Un-asXREDPXGi4nNOLgiw1nlg3LfcPcrjuemPSaOS8GCteHwetOR0Y1IlRwzfmL1eWqjEFsxwgkIW1gxjIp5gxN1_T7Fuazq7KFw86Oe36TIgDELqZneyeLeJctCVtEgwkKIrUWvKRdu0UcSwfKRb4T_ZKD4ZTCePKQDk65naETfpUUKpt1BRcxu2uVwxY5B62gNUKdP6QgFXq0quo0k8qjjUlllYGUZY4wzocXQ_Z7ChmK0gntz1nGREbbGJtr5q8gDMf7BU04kOS0WzYdTkfIq5PQ9rt049lJ8zsZUJeNm43dN55wWNfwtCNsVk7ppc2tmqBmVQhN-rds0sxjPsLjR4BMtdQhHtcUg/tzb7kMztEEMNOeSJs4QAYrU1KQq5MO07/8)**_.

| | Today, Christians celebrate the resurrection of Jesus Christ – a powerful symbol of forgiveness, redemption, and new life. Whether you’re gathering for a sunrise service, enjoying an Easter meal with loved ones, or simply taking a moment to reflect and pray, we hope this day fills your heart with peace and gratitude. May the message of Easter inspire us all to lead with compassion, live with purpose, cherish our blessings, and cling unfailingly to Truth. Wishing you and your family a joyful and blessed Easter, Oregon GOP

Will you add your name now? >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60619?t=4&akid=23003%2E4449941%2E6osk6w) | [SIGN THE PETITION NOW >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60619?t=5&akid=23003%2E4449941%2E6osk6w)

This petition is registered to [dpwillis67@gmail.com.

](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60619?t=6&akid=23003%2E4449941%2E6osk6w) Donald Trump never would have become President without the flow of Dark Money into our elections.

[ **Just look at what Elon Musk did in 2024:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60619?t=7&akid=23003%2E4449941%2E6osk6w) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/60619?t=8&akid=23003%2E4449941%2E6osk6w)
It’s absolutely inconceivable!

Folks, it’s Senator Lisa Blunt Rochester. I can’t believe MAGA Republicans in the House just pushed through this dangerous bill: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106187928/540696296/-499364019?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.20_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFjNGU5MC0xMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QknlOHG4jT052DGbenqif3C7c151dB0ZS18ZXVarF7Y=) That’s right, folks: Trump’s loyalists in Congress are trying to place _unnecessary and extremely restrictive_ barriers on voting. The SAVE Act would require people to go in person to an election office and prove their citizenship before they’re allowed to register to vote or update their information – _and it will lead to**devastating** consequences on Americans’ ability to access the polls._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106187929/540696297/-499364019?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.20_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFjNGU5MC0xMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QknlOHG4jT052DGbenqif3C7c151dB0ZS18ZXVarF7Y=) **Folks, right now, Senate Democrats have the opportunity to block this extremist bill from becoming law – but it’s going to be tough.[I am doing everything I can to keep voting rights protected, but I need your grassroots support today to help fuel my work. Can you chip in $5 or anything you can spare today to boost the fight for democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106187930/540696298/-499364019?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.20_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFjNGU5MC0xMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QknlOHG4jT052DGbenqif3C7c151dB0ZS18ZXVarF7Y=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | ****[CHIP IN $5 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106187931/540696299/-499364019?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode2=EL5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.20_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFjNGU5MC0xMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QknlOHG4jT052DGbenqif3C7c151dB0ZS18ZXVarF7Y=)****

Folks, my great-great-great-grandfather was a slave who finally gained his voting rights in 1867 after the Civil War.
But even though slavery ended, there were still many serious hurdles to overcome for Black Americans who wanted to vote, like literacy tests and poll taxes.
**I know how difficult it has been to secure the freedom to vote, which is why I will fight tirelessly against the SAVE Act and any attempt to stop Americans from exercising that fundamental freedom.**
**[Please help keep my pro-democracy work going strong with a grassroots donation today. Your support will go a long way.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106187937/540696305/-499364019?refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.04.20_SAVE-Act_B1_F1_S1_C1_210DONx90DO_N-T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMTFjNGU5MC0xMDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QknlOHG4jT052DGbenqif3C7c151dB0ZS18ZXVarF7Y=)**

Senator Blunt Rochester

If you would like to get less email, To unsubscribe, | | = Folks, it’s Senator Lisa Blunt Rochester. I can’t believe MAGA Republicans in the House just pushed through this dangerous bill: = That’s right, folks: Trump’s loyalists in Congress are trying to place unnecessary and extremely restrictive barriers on voting. The SAVE Act would require people to go in person to an election office and prove their citizenship before they’re allowed to register to vote or update their information – and it will lead todevastating consequences on Americans’ ability to access the polls. = Folks, right now, Senate Democrats have the opportunity to block this extremist bill from becoming law – but it’s going to be tough.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | **= | | **=** | **=** | | **=** | **=** | | **=** Folks, my great-great-great-grandfather was a slave who finally gained his voting rights in 1867 after the Civil War. But even though slavery ended, there were still many serious hurdles to overcome for Black Americans who wanted to vote, like literacy tests and poll taxes. I know how difficult it has been to secure the freedom to vote, which is why I will fight tirelessly against the SAVE Act and any attempt to stop Americans from exercising that fundamental freedom. = | = Thank you for being part of my movement for justice, Senator Blunt Rochester | = I officially became the first woman and person of color to ever represent Delaware in the Senate. disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHRIS DELUZIO FOR CONGRESS
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106188393/540697611/1895761198?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWNhZDk2Yy0xMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X9oOiU_sqgrnmUHNZdmLy66N89kKpTAIS7imiZrlQPo=&emci=7388e166-111e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=9ecad96c-111e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=13185894) Derek,

Out of control corporate power has been killing the American Dream, hurting small businesses and those entrepreneurs, hurting workers, hurting all of us as consumers.

**That’s why this week, I joined colleagues down in Washington to launch the 'Monopoly Busters Caucus.' Our focus is taking on the corporate power that is stifling growth and ripping off workers, small businesses, and consumers.**

Small businesses are so important to our country, our regions, and our main streets. These are often the lifeblood of our communities.

But they’ve been getting the crap kicked out of them by monopolies. And Republicans are too deep in the pockets of huge corporations to do anything about price gouging and rising costs. Their answer is just more handout tax cuts for them.

That’s why corporate profits are skyrocketing, but working families are struggling to make ends meet. [**It’s time to take on these price-gouging monopolies and lower costs for the American people. name: Wes Moore
subject: Helping Marylanders reclaim their livelihood
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106188274/540697305/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE3NDI0NS0xMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmkGyZg_rmgnUEcQMpcB4mPk_GDv_fMPcA53kyO63mQ=&emci=7125726a-0f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=12a74245-111e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=24635485)
Back in 2022, Marylanders passed a referendum to legalize the possession and use of recreational cannabis. This was a historic step in the right direction, _but it was just the start._ We can’t celebrate the benefits of legalization if we ignore the consequences of criminalization. Legalization did not erase the fact that nearly half of the arrests made for drug possession in the early 2000s were for cannabis violations. It didn’t erase the fact that black Marylanders were _three times_ more likely to be arrested for cannabis than white Marylanders. It doesn’t erase the fact that having a conviction on your record makes it harder for people to access housing, employment, and education. **That is why my administration pardoned 175,000 convictions for misdemeanor cannabis possession:_The largest state pardon in the history of this country._** I am proud to have helped thousands of Marylanders reclaim their livelihood, but this is just the first step. Policymaking is powerful. And, if you look at the past, you can see that policies have been used to hold back entire communities. The war on drugs is just one example. **There is still more work to do to enact the kinds of policies that can reverse the harm of the past, and help us work together to build a better future.** **[In order to keep making history we need your support. Please, chip in $5 today to help us fight for progress.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106188276/540697310/1077344676?refcode=em20250420-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmE3NDI0NS0xMTFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YmkGyZg_rmgnUEcQMpcB4mPk_GDv_fMPcA53kyO63mQ=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

clean_body: Back in 2022, Marylanders passed a referendum to legalize the possession and use of recreational cannabis. This was a historic step in the right direction, but it was just the start. We can’t celebrate the benefits of legalization if we ignore the consequences of criminalization. Legalization did not erase the fact that nearly half of the arrests made for drug possession in the early 2000s were for cannabis violations. It didn’t erase the fact that black Marylanders were three times more likely to be arrested for cannabis than white Marylanders. It doesn’t erase the fact that having a conviction on your record makes it harder for people to access housing, employment, and education. That is why my administration pardoned 175,000 convictions for misdemeanor cannabis possession:The largest state pardon in the history of this country. I am proud to have helped thousands of Marylanders reclaim their livelihood, but this is just the first step. Policymaking is powerful. And, if you look at the past, you can see that policies have been used to hold back entire communities. The war on drugs is just one example. There is still more work to do to enact the kinds of policies that can reverse the harm of the past, and help us work together to build a better future. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Elevate, Wes Moore

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1011&refcode=email-20250420_v&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]Our Revolution logo

Bernie Sanders and Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are taking the fight for a
political revolution into places where national political attention rarely
falls: Nampa, Idaho; Folsom, California; Missoula, Montana.

They broke records with the rallies in Los Angeles and Denver, and we’re
joining them to take this message to every corner of the country.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250420&t=1061&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]Bernie Tweet about Nampa Rally

Why? Because fighting Trump’s extremist authoritarian agenda means
standing shoulder-to-shoulder with working people everywhere—not just
where it's politically convenient.

This isn't politics as usual. These are conservative towns and cities
where lawmakers take voters for granted, where there are communities
craving real change, and where thousands are filling town halls and
convention centers to join the political revolution.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20250420nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]Our Revolution is working to ensure Bernie and AOC’s message reaches
thousands of politically ignored cities like Nampa and Folsom across the
country to build a truly national grassroots army to take down Trump. Can
you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you're able to help us fuel this
movement?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20250420nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20250420nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20250420nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20250420nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

This fight isn’t about politicians—it’s about people. Bernie and AOC are
bringing attention to areas left behind by the political establishment.

In Missoula, Montana, families face crushing medical debt while
pharmaceutical giants lobby Trump for even higher profits. In Folsom,
California—a city often overshadowed by its larger neighbors—working-class
communities are battling wage stagnation and unaffordable childcare. And
in Nampa, Idaho’s doctor shortages and near-total abortion ban were top of
the agenda this week.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/25041?source=email-20250420&t=1060&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]Headline on Nampa Rally

These places—and countless others—are exactly where Bernie and AOC are
focusing their fight. Because change comes from the ground up, not the top
down. It comes from the overlooked corners of the country that are
desperate to make their voices heard. That’s why we’re asking for your
help to take this fight everywhere.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/23008?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20250420nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=8299%2E5885482%2E-0BrjU ]Your donation today helps us organize voters, support progressive
candidates, and power our Citizen Action Team and turn Bernie and AOC's
powerful rallies into sustained grassroots action. Will you stand with
Bernie and AOC today by making a contribution?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

| | These two topics are two of the most important AND urgent so we are repeating what we sent last week. Coming up soon (maybe even tomorrow, but at latest midweek this coming week) will be a digital "Call to Action" on Medical Freedom. Expect to see a special email from us during the upcoming week.

Hoping you experienced a devout Easter or Passover!
---
|
---
| | ** **
**CALL TO

"DIGITAL ACTIVISM"!**
** **
**THE OHIO HOUSE PASSED A '26-'27 BUDGET WITH A $600M GIVEAWAY TO BILLIONAIRES, INCREASED SPENDING, NO HEALTH FREEDOM & NO ELECTION INTEGRITY!

ARE YOU ANGRY? TAKE IT OUT ON THEM DIGITALLY! YOU DON'T EVEN NEED TO LEAVE THE COUCH!**
\
---
| **UPDATE: Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, YET LEFT THE $600M GIVE-AWAY to the BILLIONAIRE Haslam family IN THE 26-'27 OHIO STATE BUDGET BILL (HB 96) now sent to the Ohio Senate for approval to be sent to the governor to make it LAW!**

It's time to **take** **massive action** , and GFI has implemented a "Digital Activism System" (aka "Digital Activism Platform") to make it **quick & easy** for you to make your displeasure known to every House Member who sold us out -- with the **push of a button** \-- **WITHOUT LEAVING THE HOUSE**!

**Here's a video explanation of the system:**

---
| [ ](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=c7bb905cbf&e=5c740fa3e2)
---
CLICK for a video explanation of GFI's new "Digital Activism System".
|
**NOW: Here's where YOU come in!**

Please go to [**THIS WEB PAGE**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=fceefd7297&e=5c740fa3e2) (or click on the image below) and follow the directions. It simple, easy, and quick ... a minute or two tops! We want to let our elected officials know we're not happy and we're no longer going to sit quietly in our dipleasure. It's time to **PROUDLY SPEAK UP & SPEAK OUT, DIGITALLY!

_Thank you!_**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d674ec4b3e&e=5c740fa3e2)

---
|
---
|
---
| | | ** **
**A CONTINUING

CALL TO ACTION!**
** **
**DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2!**
** **
**SPREAD THE WORD!
$2.5B BOND ISSUE ON
OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT!
WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW!
WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT!**

---
| _<**We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it!** >_

**This issue is beatable!**
1) Turnout for the **May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION** is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes.
2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential.
3) **FIRST** , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, **A VERY REASONABLE** thing to do.
4) **SECOND** , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections **and get them to vote** , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also **A VERY REASONABLE** thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county.
5) **WHEN** we do this, **WE WIN!** The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, **A****VERY REASONABLE** objective!
**WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN!**
Over the next week, **PLEASE** :
* Make 10 **social media posts** on the issue
* **Send texts** about the issue to 10 people
* **Send emails** about the issue to another (different) 10 people
* **Make calls** about the issue to 10 more (different) people
* Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go **to vote with you**
* Persuade 10 people not previously contacted **to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help**

_****__**Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people.**_
If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this **stealthy, unnecessary, costly** , $2.5B bond issue!
**LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN!**

* * *

[**NEW**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=af622e9978&e=5c740fa3e2)[**WEBPAGE FOR YOU TO BOOKMARK WITH RESOURCES TO HELP US ALL FIGHT ISSUE 2!**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=de0823f550&e=5c740fa3e2)

We [**PREVIOUSLY**](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=d1adf06fd8&e=5c740fa3e2) made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! **EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH!**

**HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP!**

1) PLEASE **forward this message** to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
2) PLEASE download **[THIS GRAPHIC](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=b1a16616c1&e=5c740fa3e2) (same as below)** to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, **especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election!
NEW >>>> 3)****** PLEASE **refer** as many people as you can **to the new Issue 2[WEBPAGE](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=e10690183c&e=5c740fa3e2)**!

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=accc440a44&e=5c740fa3e2)
**(Click the image above to download!)
BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE**
It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. Once you've watched it, please SHARE it with everyone you can!
Thank you!

**EPISODE: "Ohio's Stealthy May Bond Issue"**

[](https://gfiohio.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c2cee5a5358289d5dd20ff17d&id=6f186b14fa&e=5c740fa3e2)

---

**Prior Issues of This Email
You May Find Valuable**

Thank you for subscribing & staying subscribed! Hoping you experienced a devout Easter or Passover! | | | CALL TO "DIGITAL ACTIVISM"! THE OHIO HOUSE PASSED A '26-'27 BUDGET WITH A $600M GIVEAWAY TO BILLIONAIRES, INCREASED SPENDING, NO HEALTH FREEDOM & NO ELECTION INTEGRITY! ARE YOU ANGRY? TAKE IT OUT ON THEM DIGITALLY! YOU DON'T EVEN NEED TO LEAVE THE COUCH! \ | UPDATE: Republican Ohio House Leadership rejected every health freedom amendment put forward by Ohio's health freedom activists & agreeable sponsors, YET LEFT THE $600M GIVE-AWAY to the BILLIONAIRE Haslam family IN THE 26-'27 OHIO STATE BUDGET BILL (HB 96) now sent to the Ohio Senate for approval to be sent to the governor to make it LAW! It's time to take massive action , and GFI has implemented a "Digital Activism System" (aka "Digital Activism Platform") to make it quick & easy for you to make your displeasure known to every House Member who sold us out -- with the push of a button \-- WITHOUT LEAVING THE HOUSE! Here's a video explanation of the system: | CLICK for a video explanation of GFI's new "Digital Activism System". | NOW: Here's where YOU come in! Please go to (or click on the image below) and follow the directions. It simple, easy, and quick ... a minute or two tops! We want to let our elected officials know we're not happy and we're no longer going to sit quietly in our dipleasure. It's time to PROUDLY SPEAK UP & SPEAK OUT, DIGITALLY! Thank you! | | | | | A CONTINUING CALL TO ACTION! DON'T FORGET ABOUT ISSUE 2! SPREAD THE WORD! $2.5B BOND ISSUE ON OHIO'S MAY PRIMARY BALLOT! WHAT EVERYONE NEEDS TO KNOW! WE MUST GET THE WORD OUT! | <We've left prior weeks' information on Issue 2 below just in case you missed it! > This issue is beatable! 1) Turnout for the May 6th PRIMARY ELECTION is expected to be around 5% of registered Ohio voters. That's about 400,000 total votes. 2) The past 2 times a similar bond issue was on the ballot, the winning margin was 19.23%, let's round that up to 20%. That means 60% YES & 40% NO. Or, 240,000 YES votes & 160,000 NO votes. A 20% difference or 80,000 vote differential. 3) FIRST , if we can educate 10% of the potential YES voters & turn them to NO voters, the result would be 216,000 YES votes & 184,000 NO votes, a 24,000 vote swing. Across Ohio's 88 counties we'd need to persuade 273 YES voters to vote NO, A VERY REASONABLE thing to do. 4) SECOND , if we can activate 40,000 voters who typically don't vote in primary elections and get them to vote , that's a turnout increase of only 0.5%, or one-half of one percent! This is also A VERY REASONABLE thing for us to try to get done! It's only an additional 455 votes per county. 5) WHEN we do this, WE WIN! The final vote count would be 224,000 NO and 216,000 YES = 440,000 total votes = 5.5% turnout. Again, AVERY REASONABLE objective! WHAT EACH OF US CAN DO TO SPREAD THE WORD AND MAKE THIS HAPPEN! Over the next week, PLEASE : Make 10 social media posts on the issue Send texts about the issue to 10 people Send emails about the issue to another (different) 10 people Make calls about the issue to 10 more (different) people Persuade 10 more (new) people to commit to go to vote with you Persuade 10 people not previously contacted to make absentee (mail-in) ballot requests with your help **Try to contact 50 DIFFERENT people. If each of the 11,000+ subscribers to this email did this, we would easily defeat this stealthy, unnecessary, costly , $2.5B bond issue! LET'S MAKE IT HAPPEN! We made you aware there's a bond issue on the Ohio primary election ballot in May. Now we must make sure others are aware! EARLY VOTING STARTS APRIL 8TH! HERE'S WHAT YOU CAN DO TO HELP! 1) PLEASE forward this message to as many people as you can, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! 2) PLEASE download (same as below) to your phone & send it to everyone you can, again, especially those who typically would not vote in a primary election! NEW >>>> 3)** PLEASE refer as many people as you can to the new Issue 2! (Click the image above to download!) BACKGROUND ON THIS BOND ISSUE It's for $2.5B dollars with spending limits of $250,000,000 annually. Supposedly, it's necessary for the health and well-being of Ohio's infrastructure. We'll bet most Ohioans haven't heard about it and know almost nothing about it. That's intentional. It's taxpayer abuse. A great strategy might be to vote NO on it. Here's why in a short video. name: David Hogg
subject: Because I’m a Democrat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
We’re not challenging Democrats to tear the party down. We’re doing it to build it back stronger.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250420-1&t=1&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)
Peter, I want to say something clearly: **I’m a proud Democrat.**
I’m proud that Democrats:
✅ Passed the first gun safety law in 30 years.
✅ Invested billions in mental health, housing, and clean energy.
✅ Cut child poverty, capped insulin costs, and forgave student loan debt.
But let’s be honest: **our party is in TROUBLE**.
Right now, Democrats are deeply unpopular – especially with young people. Many of our leaders have lost touch with the urgency this moment demands.
And in safe blue seats across the country, some of the Democrats holding on to power for years are the very same politicians standing in the way of our progress.
**We can’t fix that by pretending everything is fine.**
**We fix it by stepping up. By speaking hard truths. And yes – by running primary challengers** when the people in power aren’t doing their jobs.
This week, we launched a **$20 million plan** to elect bold, progressive challengers in safe blue districts. It’s not because we hate the party. _It’s because we believe in it._
We’re not trying to burn the house down. We’re trying to rebuild it from the foundation up and make sure it finally works for _all of us._**[If you’re with us, Peter, pitch in $5 now to build the future of the Democratic Party.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250420-1?refcode=em20250420-2013&amount=5&refcode2=2013_587540_udMdBI&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-20250420-1?amount=5&refcode=em20250420-2013&refcode2=2013_587540_udMdBI&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)**
This is what rebuilding looks like. Let’s get to it.
In solidarity,
David Hogg
Leaders We Deserve
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250420-1&t=2&refcode2=2013_587540_udMdBI&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2013%2E587540%2EudMdBI)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. Is it appropriate to dump a bunch of snarkiness onto the internet on Christianity’s holiest day? Probably not, but I am going to do it anyway [...] | | A Happy and Blessed Easter to All Our Readers! – HotAir May all of our readers have a happy and blessed Easter celebration today! We would also like to wish our Jewish readers a belated blessed Passover, which took place a week ago. Tonight’s Gospel reading from the Easter Vigil is Luke 24:1–12, when the women come across the empty [...] | | The most hopeful words ever spoken ALL doctors must regularly confront the fact of the end of life. I have some standout memories of my own, and I should warn you that some of these are quite distressing. The first was when I was a very junior doctor, about 18 months into my career. The patient, a man in his sixties, [...] | | Classics for Easter: Easter Hymn from Cavalleria Rusticana by Mascagni A LONG time ago I wrote about the one-act opera Cavalleria Rusticana and the marvellous Intermezzo, and you can read the article here. The setting of the work is a 19th century Sicilian village; the action takes place on the morning of Easter Sunday. Santuzza has been seduced and abandoned by Turridu. After he dies [...] | | The evidence for the resurrection TWO thousand years ago a working-class Jew in Israel was executed by the Roman authorities at the instigation of Jewish religious leaders. He was buried, yet rose again, and history pivoted. The lives of billions were renewed; as a result old nations fell and new arose, cultures and science developed, all was changed utterly. Yet [...] |

body:
Our target states are battlegrounds where Democratic majorities are won and lost by razor-thin margins. Here’s where we’re focused on safeguarding our Democratic power this cycle: | | |
---
| |
---|---
Last cycle, five of our critical battleground chambers were decided by a _single seat_ , **directly impacting the lives of 40 million Americans.** **As we head into another high-stakes cycle, we can’t afford not to have you on our team.**[Can you contribute $3 to help power Democratic candidates to victory? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu05XtZnrBMT5R_mtAuAjxDSCrqP7HuqdVbYWeROcw0Lu11hrGnG325WQ9rW_1ZG7KsxI5-yI3NF1qjYUP3Hk9mX4hO6GPkHHSevnw5uXQ2dJEYS9Ere0ltySjYYsYliDCgn_xZys30LzH3B026pbpOxy5aEhA1y7jKFJABQm-tA9KIaVa-UKwYPAgTNjMtfix7BhpbPokUjRzRntH-v7aiYXv0bXzAL7OrLzEqcdFba20Dpxp3oHz-CvO9vMFBs2qUt9Z6tIo5EYuyjUteg23NEwOYH8cgEPZWy-7kKQshbkUUw0Ngk3oEtiCwaiVdp4lmYA5WlXfbRpmgx-4KbOYEIBjFm6hIiPMS7udDb_K7JYZ_3HYwxZqMMwyRC5w9rNdiVQuytqAdG5JGiWUIif7F0IZ4uRNalFEfHaenbPgMkWvkrIIlcJh4knkRTX87a41cJZC59xqQay8UfSHL37A8oN2dOVc0qxYZbjGcFFMI1zMW8d8wL_FYRaITgD0sakdP1iImFZUHsEvC_ygjJsDBaNWbM5tFycvHkc-XkOqdDGUvYXd-5WEmSczBxQVq9lhUBpIIsEoNwxryGI_l8KTg7WzITx2ugMyCvsypBYs76Q3GZX2WAZVdDqdYwUnGsIeNM1dcYp86Nhw1JGxYoinfJeANY8jY3yBTW635zN7zVA/4ft/Cl2-2FisTBypKt283MEYww/h0/h001.eDX9lojaZQwSDk9Zyy7ZOvj9q13_t40DOIdPpeB6-wI) Our target states are battlegrounds where Democratic majorities are won and lost by razor-thin margins. **Here’s where we’re focused on safeguarding our Democratic power this cycle:** 👉 **Minnesota** – Just one seat could give our party a Democratic trifecta. 👉 **Michigan** – We must defend our narrow one-seat majority in the Senate and break Republicans’ majority in the House. 👉 **Pennsylvania** – State Dems have protected our one-seat majority in the House through at least eight majority-making special elections. 👉 **Virginia** – Securing full legislative control in 2023 paved the way for progress in the commonwealth. Now, Democrats must hold the line. The work to build and defend Democratic power in our statehouses starts now. Early investments are one of the most powerful tools to defeat extremist Republicans, and your contribution today will help shape the future of state legislatures nationwide. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our supporters. Please add us to your address book or safe senders list to ensure timely election updates.

clean_body: Our target states are battlegrounds where Democratic majorities are won and lost by razor-thin margins. Here’s where we’re focused on safeguarding our Democratic power this cycle: | | | | | ---|--- Last cycle, five of our critical battleground chambers were decided by a single seat , directly impacting the lives of 40 million Americans. As we head into another high-stakes cycle, we can’t afford not to have you on our team. Our target states are battlegrounds where Democratic majorities are won and lost by razor-thin margins. Here’s where we’re focused on safeguarding our Democratic power this cycle: 👉 Minnesota – Just one seat could give our party a Democratic trifecta. 👉 Michigan – We must defend our narrow one-seat majority in the Senate and break Republicans’ majority in the House. 👉 Pennsylvania – State Dems have protected our one-seat majority in the House through at least eight majority-making special elections. 👉 Virginia – Securing full legislative control in 2023 paved the way for progress in the commonwealth. Now, Democrats must hold the line. The work to build and defend Democratic power in our statehouses starts now. Early investments are one of the most powerful tools to defeat extremist Republicans, and your contribution today will help shape the future of state legislatures nationwide. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | Together, Team DLCC | Prepared and paid for by DLCC Victory Fund, 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005. name: Hillsdale College via Victory News
subject: We will not forget God
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj2045wh8ivz97jz0m2cur2hunboixmjdnqjcg8u9ghl1iflf0u5jepk7erqyyy3rpajzol4mvfqypo068m51&__stmp=sv1879&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jycld4mukxakswgtx3ptcqyc5ta0qz0q5olcpq84619vq8lhl9gldwlbb6x9jcyyhnwetbvdnv1oojlg2eqkgcxdv33rott0uhp7b683pf6st87gmicva9hq4wdo54578qcwz3xneq3bqyt4k99l&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jycld4mukxakswgtx3ptcqycr4csyqk8jm762wxdophq8vbfbtu5k4s7hbalqo1ad8z4u8lyq6hzb1bahjugtohu7liq9re0ry82va8bc97ke5j1ofg6n9tzfu19xjadwarjrw8nzrfqinwrhjb9&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sv1879&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Silence isn’t an option.

Have you seen this? We reached out about Trump’s dangerous executive orders to boost coal production and roll back key climate protections, and the response was _overwhelming._ **Over 5,000 supporters have already signed our petition, but we haven’t seen your name yet.** Don’t worry, we’re keeping it open a few hours longer in case you missed the first message. Your voice matters, and there’s still time to sign on. **[We need you with us: Add your name right now to condemn Trump’s toxic coal agenda before it’s too late >>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106192829/540709522/-611924833?refcode=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYTI1ZGVlLTFmMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R0r1Pusg_M8f0oRU1pE1Z7BK1XcHZJjumJ2rIJ5Kg5E=&emci=43858856-611c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)** | [**SIGN THE PETITION →**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106192830/540709523/-611924833?refcode=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYTI1ZGVlLTFmMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R0r1Pusg_M8f0oRU1pE1Z7BK1XcHZJjumJ2rIJ5Kg5E=&emci=43858856-611c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)

> * * *
> Trump wants to label coal as _“beautiful” and “clean.”_ Who is he kidding?
> Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities — especially those near mines and power plants — at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer.
> And yet, earlier this week Trump signed a series of executive orders to bring back dirty, polluting coal at the expense of our communities. The executive orders will:
> * _Allow coal plants that were scheduled to shut down to keep running, even if they’re outdated and highly polluting._
>
>
> * _Suspend federal rules that limit emissions of mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals._
>
>
> * _Direct agencies to open more federal land for coal mining and halt efforts to transition away from fossil fuels._
>
>
> * _Go after states that have passed their own clean energy laws — like California and New Mexico — by ordering the Justice Department to challenge their authority to act on climate._
>

> All of this is happening despite the fact that renewable energy is cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. **But Trump doesn’t care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution.**
> That’s why we’re gathering signatures from our most active supporters to show that Trump’s agenda is not only unpopular with people in 18326 — but that the rest of us are raising our voices to stop these attacks.
> **[Can you represent grassroots supporters in 18326 today by signing our petition to condemn Trump’s toxic coal agenda and demand a clean energy future?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/106192835/540709528/-611924833?refcode=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ms=ea.4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhYTI1ZGVlLTFmMWUtZjAxMS04YjNkLTAwMjI0ODJhOWZiNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=R0r1Pusg_M8f0oRU1pE1Z7BK1XcHZJjumJ2rIJ5Kg5E=&emci=43858856-611c-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&emdi=4aa25dee-1f1e-f011-8b3d-0022482a9fb7&ceid=4823105)**

clean_body: Silence isn’t an option. | Have you seen this? We reached out about Trump’s dangerous executive orders to boost coal production and roll back key climate protections, and the response was overwhelming. Over 5,000 supporters have already signed our petition, but we haven’t seen your name yet. Don’t worry, we’re keeping it open a few hours longer in case you missed the first message. Your voice matters, and there’s still time to sign on. | Thanks for stepping up, Team JanePAC Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Signature Needed (via JanePAC.com) Date: Apr 12, 2025 Subject: Sign the petition: Stop Trump’s toxic coal agenda URGENT: Donald Trump has signed a MASSIVE rollback of climate protections to boost coal production. The consequences will be deadly. --- Trump wants to label coal as “beautiful” and “clean.” Who is he kidding? Coal is one of the biggest drivers of climate change. It releases more carbon dioxide when burned than any other fossil fuel. It poisons our air and water and puts low-income and working-class communities — especially those near mines and power plants — at greater risk of asthma, heart disease, and cancer. And yet, earlier this week Trump signed a series of executive orders to bring back dirty, polluting coal at the expense of our communities. The executive orders will: Allow coal plants that were scheduled to shut down to keep running, even if they’re outdated and highly polluting. Suspend federal rules that limit emissions of mercury, arsenic, and other toxic chemicals. Direct agencies to open more federal land for coal mining and halt efforts to transition away from fossil fuels. Go after states that have passed their own clean energy laws — like California and New Mexico — by ordering the Justice Department to challenge their authority to act on climate. All of this is happening despite the fact that renewable energy is cheaper, cleaner, and more reliable. But Trump doesn’t care about facts. He cares about billionaires who profit from pollution. That’s why we’re gathering signatures from our most active supporters to show that Trump’s agenda is not only unpopular with people in 18326 — but that the rest of us are raising our voices to stop these attacks. --- This movement is powered by people like you who care deeply and act boldly — and we aren’t turning away. Thanks for taking the time to sign our petition, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Tina for Oregon
subject: Here’s how Tina got her start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
Peter, **First,** Tina Kotek got involved in public service because she knew we could do better. After moving here to attend University of Oregon, she saw firsthand the struggles families faced — from housing challenges to a broken education system. She made it her mission to serve the people of Oregon and create positive change. **Then,** Tina ran for governor on a promise to build a stronger, better Oregon for all. She pledged to address the housing crisis, increase school accountability, and tackle mental and behavioral health issues head-on. Her vision for Oregon was bold, but it was grounded in the belief that every Oregonian deserves a shot at a better future. **Now,** Tina is working every day to deliver on those promises. She’s making it easier to build new housing, updating our curriculum to improve literacy rates, and expanding access to mental and behavioral health care. But there’s still so much more to do — and she can’t do it alone. **That’s where you come in. Tina needs your help to keep moving Oregon forward and continue making progress for everyone in the state.[Will you chip in today to support her work and ensure we keep Oregon on the right path?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106193544/540711132/299577830?refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZkZTM0OS0yNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFnl3-EY3g88z2LA16aVRvxFVFOdW17-Tt2ujjVS_Yc=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/106193545/540711133/-1270421739?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_TK_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250420_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YWZkZTM0OS0yNDFlLWYwMTEtOGIzZC0wMDIyNDgyYTlmYjciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AFnl3-EY3g88z2LA16aVRvxFVFOdW17-Tt2ujjVS_Yc=)

name: Team WFP
subject: Working families are hungry for real leadership
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
We are showing up in numbers — for each other. | | | Peter, People all over the country are hungry for real political leadership. And if you’re pissed off at the GOP’s pillaging of our country — **you’re not alone.** Just look at the millions who showed up this month in over 1,300 cities and small towns to tell Trump and the GOP “Hands Off” our Social Security, our healthcare, and our futures. Or look at the record-breaking crowds that have shown up for at Bernie and AOC’s “Fight Oligarchy” tour across the country these last few weeks: **23,000 in Tucson. 34,000 in Denver. 12,000 in Idaho.** That includes tens of thousands at three rallies across California last weekend, where they were joined by CAWFP elected champions and CAWFP State Director Jane Kim. clean_body: We are showing up in numbers — for each other. | | | Peter, People all over the country are hungry for real political leadership. And if you’re pissed off at the GOP’s pillaging of our country — you’re not alone. Just look at the millions who showed up this month in over 1,300 cities and small towns to tell Trump and the GOP “Hands Off” our Social Security, our healthcare, and our futures. Or look at the record-breaking crowds that have shown up for at Bernie and AOC’s “Fight Oligarchy” tour across the country these last few weeks: 23,000 in Tucson. 34,000 in Denver. 12,000 in Idaho. That includes tens of thousands at three rallies across California last weekend, where they were joined by CAWFP elected champions and CAWFP State Director Jane Kim. Republicans like to pretend that their disastrous policies are popular — that they somehow have a "mandate" from the people to tank the economy, abduct our neighbors, and go after our healthcare and Social Security to give more tax cuts to billionaires. But they’re wrong. All across America, working families are demanding an opposition that shows the courage to forcefully oppose the Trump/Musk agenda. We’re demanding a government that actually works FOR US , not the billionaires. And we are showing up in numbers for EACH OTHER. That’s the kind of party that we’re building, Peter. But we can’t do it without you. Working families — and our WFP champions in elected office — are as motivated as ever to actually dig in and do the work. In solidarity, Team WFP Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. name: Prudent Politics
subject: Your copy of Milton Friedman's free eBook, Why Government is the Problem
body:
Please read the following message.
* * *

| | | | [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueik2Iteknop5I4ITm9qcaanh&s=MLEDFPMDMOIKPDAB)
---
| | Dear Friend,Do you feel like the policy solutions offered by the government often create more problems than they solve?

From education to healthcare and beyond, it's clear that good intentions don't always lead to good outcomes.
---
| [](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueik2Iteknop5I5ITm9qcaanh&s=MLEDFPMDMOIKPDAB)
---
| | That's why I'm excited to share a free digital copy of Milton Friedman's thought-provoking eBook, "Why Government Is the Problem."

In this insightful read, Friedman dives deep into:
* Unveiling how government interventions can worsen the social and economic problems they're trying to fix.
* Revealing the influence of special interests in policymaking, often at the expense of everyday citizens.
* Explaining why limiting government involvement might be the key to solving our most pressing challenges.

It's a must-read for anyone curious about the impact of government actions on our society. Originally written in 1993, Friedman's analysis remains as relevant today as ever.

Are you ready to explore a new perspective? [Click here to get your free copy](https://e.nl.vintagetec.com/re?l=D0I2xueik2Iteknop5I6ITm9qcaanh&s=MLEDFPMDMOIKPDAB) of "Why Government Is the Problem" now.
Greg Greg Stamps | Online DevelopmentHoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

# [Why cable news died after Tucker Carlson left Fox News](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=161747041&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTYxNzQ3MDQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NDUxODQ2NTgsImV4cCI6MTc0Nzc3NjY1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.pch-SKAgxavFpl_nFBon9Q-6t1U9pq0mr-Cqw0ImptI)

Apr 20
---

---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7271b395-c9d9-4957-bc35-6afd036da062?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When I first met Tucker Carlson in the summer of 2017, I sat down in front of the broad, sturdy wooden desk in his Fox News office expecting to discuss my role in spearheading the Caller's new video operation.

I introduced myself and Tucker replied, "Richie McGinniss? That sounds like a famous person's name!" One thing even Tucker's adversaries can't deny after meeting him, he is a charming guy.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HxuSs5No5PVGx0-1sMS3j98W4GtEzj8FDMoyhiT5U-Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161747041)
I had just started my job at The Daily Caller, a company that he founded in 2010, while Tucker had just taken over the prime-time 8 PM slot vacated by Bill O'Reilly after some salacious revelations.

Despite the notoriety of his new gig, Tucker was more interested in hearing about where I came from and what made me tick.

I had just lost my father and, as an actual family man rather than pretending to be one on TV, Tucker wanted to know more about how my family was doing after the loss, and who my dad was. I mentioned that, though he was a doctor, my dad and I watched the news together every night growing up, and my dad's predictions of what would come of the Iraq War were spot on. I also told him that we often made fun of the robotic voices of the correspondents, whose on-camera personae were a far cry from their personalities in real life.

I had worked at MSNBC where I should have been fired, and Tucker laughed because he was actually fired by them. Tucker was not surprised to hear that when I worked at MSNBC, the newsroom was a sterile and solemn environment. It was like the funeral home of a dying institution, while the Daily Caller newsroom was full of young people yelling at each other about every news topic under the sun. From interns to the editor-in-chief, this flat hierarchy allowed for everyone to argue their ideas as verbosely as they liked. And for those who may question how free and open the heart of this nascent media company was, just ask Geoff Ingersoll, who was my boss while I worked there and whom I put in a headlock just for fun.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HxuSs5No5PVGx0-1sMS3j98W4GtEzj8FDMoyhiT5U-Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161747041)
Even back in 2017, Tucker agreed that in a strange way the left had become the rigid and dogmatic ones, and it just so happened that the other side of the spectrum now represented the best incubator for new ideas. This brought us to the differences between the digital video and television mediums.

"Joe Rogan is the father of my generation," I declared.

Tucker slammed his hands on his desk in animated surprise and whipped back with his quizzically high-pitched prompt, "Really?"

Perhaps it was because Rogan and Tucker are about the same age or perhaps it was because Tucker was subconsciously aware that he would one day appear on Rogan and become one of the most impactful individuals not on television, but on the world-wide web. Either way, Tucker was intrigued to hear more on why my generation and younger were tuning into podcasts rather than legacy news.

"Authenticity is the currency in the discourse," Tucker summarized after I finished my Rogan spiel. That line has stuck with me ever since.
**A message from our sponsor (piece continues below)**

# **Major Market Shift - Act Now Before It's Too Late**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdfdeb1-5dfd-4573-a780-55bb674c60a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
1983 - Motorola released the first commercial phone.
1992 - Nokia turned phones into personal devices.
And when Apple released the first iPhone in 2007, the industry changed forever. But that was 18 years ago...
Another paradigm shift is happening now, and **[Mode Mobile is leading the charge with 32,481% revenue growth](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdfdeb1-5dfd-4573-a780-55bb674c60a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[.](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdfdeb1-5dfd-4573-a780-55bb674c60a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Their _EarnPhone_ is the only smartphone that pays users for activities like playing games, listening to music and even charging their phone.
But their**current share price of $0.26/share is changing in under two weeks.**
⚠️**[Last Chance - Invest in their EarnPhone before price moves on May 1st.](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdfdeb1-5dfd-4573-a780-55bb674c60a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/4bdfdeb1-5dfd-4573-a780-55bb674c60a6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**(Continued)**

He recalled how hard he had battled to carve out autonomy in the cable news world, but given his evident lack of fear in getting fired, he always did the show his way and let the bosses upstairs decide whether he was worthy of a raise or the shit-can. In any event, Tucker refused to give up his personal voice to the corporate powers that be.

And since this conversation, our media landscape has changed dramatically. New media personalities like Rogan or Theo Von were largely responsible for Trump's 2024 win. Young people came out and voted for Trump because he was a change candidate who appealed to them via the channels that they watched, rather than the ones watched by the intellectual elites.

Again, the detractors can say what they want about Carlson, but if their accusations are to mean anything, then they must at least acknowledge that he says what he really thinks. And therein lies the reason why Tucker has become so successful despite the repeated efforts by media Goliaths like the New York Times to take him down. As our discourse is transposed from the old pillars of information--print or TV or radio--to the new platforms on the internet, audiences trust big media brands less.

Instead, they are choosing to trust individuals that they deem to be authentic and acting in good faith. The agenda-driven narratives that write the scripts in cable television and in the newsrooms of traditional outlets are finally being seen for what they are: corporate programs that care more about keeping their audience as captive consumers rather than telling them the truth about why America is becoming more sad and afraid by the day. Here's a hint: this business plan has more to do with pushing pharmaceuticals, cheap consumer goods, and fruitless foreign wars than informing you on who really pulls the strings and why.
* * *
# The Democrats' Summer of Riots Exposed:
Check out my book **["Riot Diet"](https://substack.com/redirect/5ecfe5a9-6e71-4632-ae65-ee1a0bdbb6c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for my firsthand account covering the left-wing riots of 2020 that the media told you were "peaceful protests."
FYI, they weren't...
Get your info directly from the source, not from mainstream media giants trying to sell you an agenda. **[Pick it up using the link below:](https://substack.com/redirect/5ecfe5a9-6e71-4632-ae65-ee1a0bdbb6c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5ecfe5a9-6e71-4632-ae65-ee1a0bdbb6c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Get "Riot Diet" Today](https://substack.com/redirect/5ecfe5a9-6e71-4632-ae65-ee1a0bdbb6c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
While I was covering the widespread protests and riots in 2020, this institutional inclination to tell viewers what they wanted to hear rather than what really happened became more evident than ever before. One side of the landscape only showed BLM activity when it was "mostly peaceful" while the other only focused on the most violent aspects that proved the Black Lives Matter demonstrations were inherently bad.

Regardless of where one fell on that spectrum, the pandemic and the protests made it blatantly obvious to the American public that the gatekeepers of our discourse don't give a shit about anything other than keeping multinationals like Pfizer happy, because it's through their advertising dollars that the news commentators are exorbitantly paid.

What I learned after witnessing the lockdowns and the violence during the so-called "summer of love", then covering the so-called "Capitol Insurrection" from the inside, is that the overwhelming majority of people in media are putting forth opinions that are aggregated from groupthink rather than a byproduct of their genuine beliefs.

That's why Tucker was an enigma in the space, repeatedly sharing opinions that were not in line with what the executives wanted him to say. Whether it was his questions about Dominion voting machines or January 6 instigators that ultimately got Tucker fired, we may never know. But what we do know is why people followed Tucker on his new foray into digital media: it's because people trust that no matter what the topic, Tucker will say what he truly thinks.

At its very heart, the success of Tucker's new program has to do with one thing: He is intellectually curious at a time when the rest of the media is not. He is independently minded and willing to change his views over time while the rest of America's thought leaders have become rigid and set in their ways.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HxuSs5No5PVGx0-1sMS3j98W4GtEzj8FDMoyhiT5U-Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161747041)
We find Joe Rogan and Tucker Carlson now in adjacent political camps. Not because they agree on everything, but because they have no concern with maintaining the status quo, and care more about exploring new frontiers.

The rules of the political media game are changing before our eyes. For the last century or so, this game has been refereed by the monolithic mouthpieces paid by massive corporations. But as with the printing press, the advancement of technology has shifted the paradigm and allowed anyone to jump into the arena of public debate.

We used to have our Daily Caller Christmas party at one of the bougeiest clubs in Washington, DC, the Metro Club. Everyone would get dressed to the nines and I, being somewhat of a contrarian, would come up with a new way to violate the dress code every year. The first year I snuck in wearing sandals that said FAKE NEWS (close toed shoes are required for men). The second year I sauntered in wearing a Saudi Keffiyeh on my head and used my four years of Arabic training to convince the management that I was a wealthy Saudi and therefore they could not force me to remove my headdress (hats are not allowed inside the club). The third year I showed up with a fistful of hand-rolled, home-grown doobies in a suit jacket pocket.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..HxuSs5No5PVGx0-1sMS3j98W4GtEzj8FDMoyhiT5U-Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=161747041)
When I got the award for "Funniest Caller" I came up to accept the certificate with one of the doobies in my mouth. As Tucker handed it over he laughed, "weed is lame!"

"I grew this and rolled it myself!" I replied.

"OK that's awesome," he laughed.

Tucker was open about his own struggle with vices in the past, at once both relatable and willing to admit how he had changed his ways. He looked me in the eye and paid attention to me while we spoke, rather than looking around the room for more important people than I. This cannot be said about the overwhelming majority of people who work in DC media or politics; they are more interested in kissing ass than hearing new ideas. Those are the people who still run cable news, and that approach to the rapidly changing world is why cable news is dead.
* * *
